histogram.obsolete: Deprecated as of 6/2013, replaced by Mouse.PointerSensitivity.Started.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Tracks mouse sensitivity setting on startup.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseDownDuration_Click
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user mousedown-ed a link and when the user clicked a link.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseDownFollowedByClick
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: For each click handled by an HTML anchor tag link, whether Blink saw a mousedown event preceding it. This is only measured for clicks handled by the anchor tag's default click event handler.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseDowns
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of mousedown events detected at HTML anchor-tag links' default event handler.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseOverDuration_Click
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user mouseover-ed a link and when the user clicked a link.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseOverDuration_NoClick
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user mouseover-ed a link and when the user mouseout-ed a link without click.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.MouseOvers
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of mouseover events detected at HTML anchor-tag links' default event handler.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.PreTapEventsFollowedByClick
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The tap gesture events detected before click at HTML anchor-tag links' default event handler.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.TapDownDuration_Click
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: Measures the time elapsed between when the user tapdown-ed a link and when the user clicked a link.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.TapDowns
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of gesturetapdown events detected at HTML anchor-tag links' default event handler.

histogram.name: MouseEventPrefetch.TapUnconfirmeds
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of gesturetapunconfirmed events detected at HTML anchor-tag links' default event handler.

histogram.name: MPArch.ChildProcessLaunchFirst
histogram.summary: The time it takes to spawn the first child subprocess (including sandbox init).

histogram.name: MPArch.ChildProcessLaunchSubsequent
histogram.summary: The time it takes to spawn child sub processes not counting the first one.

histogram.name: MPArch.ForkTime
histogram.summary: Time to call fork() or clone(), in ms. Recorded at each fork excluding from the zygote, only on posix platforms.

histogram.name: MPArch.IIR_InputEventDelta
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 08/2016 due to lack of use (Histogram Eraser).
histogram.summary: The time spent waiting for the renderer to acknowledge an input event.

histogram.name: MPArch.RendererLaunchFirst
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time it takes to spawn the first renderer subprocess (including sandbox init).

histogram.name: MPArch.RendererLaunchSubsequent
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time it takes to spawn renderer sub processes not counting the first one.

histogram.name: MPArch.RPHCountPerLoad
histogram.summary: The number of RenderProcessHosts (i.e. renderer processes) present when each load completes. This is basically the average number of sub-processes over time. See also Tabs.TabCountPerLoad.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_HangMonitorUnresponsive
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2017 due to lack of usage.
histogram.summary: The length of time the renderer is unresponsive according to the hang monitor. Recorded when the renderer regains responsiveness.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_InputEventDelta
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time spent waiting for the renderer to acknowledge an input event.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_OnMsgPaintRect
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time spent inside RenderWidgetHost::OnMsgPaintRect.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_OnMsgResizeOrRepaintACK
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 09/2018 as message no longer exists.
histogram.summary: The time delta for processing a paint message. On platforms that don't support asynchronous painting, this is equivalent to MPArch.RWH_TotalPaintTime.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_OnMsgScrollRect
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time spent inside RenderWidgetHost::OnMsgScrollRect.

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_OnMsgUpdateRect
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: TBD

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_RepaintDelta
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: TBD

histogram.name: MPArch.RWH_TabSwitchPaintDuration
histogram.summary: Time from tab switch requested to tab appearing on screen (Aura and Mac only).

histogram.name: MPArch.RWHH_WhiteoutDuration
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time that the user sees a blank white page after switching to a different tab, while the RenderWidgetHost receives data to paint from the renderer process.

histogram.name: MultiDevice.PostOOBESetupFlow.PageShown
histogram.summary:
Provides a count of how many times each page of the MultiDevice setup flow was reached. This allows analysis of user dropoff between subsequent pages.
The formula "Success page" / "Start page" provides the overall "success rate" of the MultiDevice setup flow, at a quick glance.
The sum of each bucket's count is not meaningful.

histogram.name: MultiDeviceSetup_NotificationClicked
histogram.summary: Counts the number of each MultiDevice setup notification clicked by a user.

histogram.name: MultiDeviceSetup_NotificationShown
histogram.summary: Counts the number of each MultiDevice setup notification shown to a user.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.DiscardedTabsPerUser
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 11/2017. Analysis confirms that the number of discards increases with the number of logged in users. No action will be taken based on this information.
histogram.summary: The relation of discarded tabs vs. the amount of simultaneous users. The counts are the number of discards and the buckets are the number of users. Since the count values are absolute numbers, they need to be normalized before use - so divide the counts by the percentage of users per session found under 'MultiProfile.UsersPerSessionIncremental'.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.SessionMode
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 09/2017 when side-by-side multi-profile mode was removed. There is now only one multi-profile mode (separate desktop). See the metric 'MultiProfile.UsersPerSessionIncremental' for overall usage of the multi-profile feature on Chrome OS.
histogram.summary: The session counter for different multi profile modes which gets stored once per session at the beginning of the session.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.SigninUserUIPath
histogram.summary: Count the number of times each UI path is taken for signing into a new account in a Chrome OS multiprofile session. UI paths include the system tray and the user account switcher on the browser frame.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.SwitchActiveUserUIPath
histogram.summary: Count the number of times each UI path is taken for switching the active account in a Chrome OS multiprofile session. UI paths include the system tray and the keyboard shortcut.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.TeleportWindow
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2018. Was not being maintained - some cases leading to teleport were not captured. See counts of 'MultiProfile.TeleportWindowType' to assess the usage of the teleport window feature.
histogram.summary: Counts the number of window teleportations when using separated desktop mode.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.TeleportWindowType
histogram.summary: Counts the number of teleported windows by types in separated desktop mode.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.UsersPerSession
histogram.summary: The number of users simultaneously signed into a multiprofile session on Chrome OS. This is recorded upon session end.

histogram.name: MultiProfile.UsersPerSessionIncremental
histogram.summary: The number of users simultaneously signed into a multiprofile session on Chrome OS. This is recorded whenever a user gets added to the session. To get the correct count, all following counts must be subtracted. Example: If 100 single user, 20 two user and 5 three user sessions, there were 100-20-5=75 single user sessions, 100-80=20 dual user sessions and so on.

histogram.name: NaCl.Client.Helper.InitState
histogram.summary: When the browser started, what happened with the NaCl helper process?

histogram.name: NaCl.Client.Helper.StateOnFork
histogram.summary: When a NaCl application process was created, what had happened with the NaCl helper process when the browser was started?

histogram.name: NaCl.Client.OSArch
histogram.summary: The OS/Architecture of a nexe that was loaded.

histogram.name: NaCl.HttpStatusCodeClass.Manifest.InstalledApp
histogram.summary: The status code returned when trying to load a manifest inside an installed app.

histogram.name: NaCl.HttpStatusCodeClass.Manifest.NotInstalledApp
histogram.summary: The status code returned when trying to load a manifest from a source other than an installed app.

histogram.name: NaCl.HttpStatusCodeClass.Nexe.InstalledApp
histogram.summary: The status code returned when trying to load a NaCl executable inside an installed app.

histogram.name: NaCl.HttpStatusCodeClass.Nexe.NotInstalledApp
histogram.summary: The status code returned when trying to load a NaCl executable from a source other than an installed app.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.Plugin
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's Chrome plugin.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.Plugin.InstalledApp
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's Chrome plugin, but only for installed apps.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.Plugin.NotInstalledApp
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's Chrome plugin, but excluding installed apps.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.SelLdr
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's sel_ldr.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.SelLdr.InstalledApp
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's sel_ldr, but only for installed apps.

histogram.name: NaCl.LoadStatus.SelLdr.NotInstalledApp
histogram.summary: The error code returned by NaCl's sel_ldr, but excluding installed apps.

histogram.name: NaCl.Manifest.IsDataURI
histogram.summary: Was the manifest specified as a data URI rather than a .nmf file?

histogram.name: NaCl.ManifestDownloadTime
histogram.summary: The time it took to download the manifset file for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.ModuleUptime.Crash
histogram.summary: The time a NaCl module ran before it crashed.

histogram.name: NaCl.ModuleUptime.Normal
histogram.summary: The time a NaCl module ran without crashing, at shutdown.

histogram.name: NaCl.NexeDownloadTime
histogram.summary: The time it took to download the main .nexe for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.NexeSize
histogram.summary: The size of the main .nexe file downloaded for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.NexeStartupTime
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when proxied execution of the NaCl module begins. This is the general startup overhead of running as a NaCl module vs a trusted PPAPI plugin.

histogram.name: NaCl.NexeStartupTimePerMB
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when proxied execution of the NaCl module begins. This is the general startup overhead of running as a NaCl module vs a trusted PPAPI plugin.

histogram.name: NaCl.Options.PNaCl.OptLevel
histogram.summary: The optimization level set for the initial Portable Native Client translation from bitcode to native code.

histogram.name: NaCl.OSArch
histogram.summary: The OS/Architecture of a nexe that was loaded.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClCache.IsHit
histogram.summary: Did the Portable Native Client translation cache find an executable translated from bitcode?

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.CompileKBPerSec
histogram.summary: The rate for compiling a Portable Native Client bitcode file to an object file in Kilobytes per second.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.CompileTime
histogram.summary: The time it took to compile a Portable Native Client bitcode file to an object file.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.LinkTime
histogram.summary: The time it took to link a Portable Native Client generated object file into a Native Client executable.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.LoadCompiler
histogram.summary: The time it took to load and validate the Portable Native Client compiler.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.LoadLinker
histogram.summary: The time it took to load and validate the Portable Native Client linker.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.PctCompiledWhenFullyDownloaded
histogram.summary: The percentage of a Portable Native Client application that is compiled by the time the application is fully downloaded (compile and download happen in parallel).

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.TotalUncachedKBPerSec
histogram.summary: The rate for completely translating a Portable Native Client bitcode file into a Native Client executable and caching the result in Kilobytes per second.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.PNaClLoadTime.TotalUncachedTime
histogram.summary: The total time it took to completely translate a Portable Native Client bitcode file into a Native Client executable, and cache the result.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.ShutdownTime.Total
histogram.summary: The time it took the NaCl module to shut down.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.Size.Manifest
histogram.summary: The size of the manifest file.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.Size.Nexe
histogram.summary: The size of the main .nexe file downloaded for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.Size.Pexe
histogram.summary: The size of the main .pexe bitcode file downloaded for a Portable Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.Size.PexeNexeSizePct
histogram.summary: The size of the main .pexe bitcode file divided by the size of the .nexe that is the result of translating the bitcode file, times 100.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.Size.PNaClTranslatedNexe
histogram.summary: The size of the main .nexe file that is the result of translating a Portable Native Client .pexe bitcode file. This reflects the amount of cache consumed.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.LoadModule
histogram.summary: The time it took to load the NaCl module into sel_ldr.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.LoadModulePerMB
histogram.summary: The time it took to load the NaCl module into sel_ldr. Normalized by the size of the .nexe, in megabytes.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.ManifestDownload
histogram.summary: The time it took to download the manifset file for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.NaClOverhead
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when proxied execution of the NaCl module begins. This is the general startup overhead of running as a NaCl module vs a trusted PPAPI plugin.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.NaClOverheadPerMB
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when proxied execution of the NaCl module begins. This is the general startup overhead of running as a NaCl module vs a trusted PPAPI plugin. Normalized by the size of the .nexe, in megabytes.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.NexeDownload
histogram.summary: The time it took to download the main .nexe for a Native Client module.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.NexeDownloadPerMB
histogram.summary: The time it took to download the main .nexe for a Native Client module. Normalized by the size of the .nexe, in megabytes.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.Total
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when the NaCl module is ready to be used.

histogram.name: NaCl.Perf.StartupTime.TotalPerMB
histogram.summary: The time it took between the Native Client plugin initialization and when the NaCl module is ready to be used. Normalized by the size of the .nexe, in megabytes.

histogram.name: NaCl.Startups
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 5/2011, data is duplicated by NaCl.NexeStartupTime, and normalizing to 'tab opens' is unusual.
histogram.summary: The number of times that Native Client has been started by loading a .nexe compared to the number of times that a tab has been opened.

histogram.name: NaCl.ValidationCache.Query
histogram.summary: Did a validation cache query find a previously known validation result?

histogram.name: NaCl.ValidationCache.Set
histogram.summary: Was the validation cache updated with a new validation result?

histogram.name: NativeAppLauncher.InstallationDetected
histogram.summary: The number of times that Chrome detected that a request to download and install another Google iOS app completed successfully.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.AuthenticationMethod
histogram.summary: The method used to authenticate to a share. This is called on each attempted mount.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.MountCount
histogram.summary: The number of active mounts that a user has. This is recorded after a share has been successfully mounted.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.MountResult
histogram.summary: The result of the mount operation for Native SMB File Share. This is recorded after the D-Bus call to Mount returns.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.ReadDirectoryCount
histogram.summary: The number of entries read when calling ReadDirectory. This is recorded after the D-Bus call to ReadDirectory returns.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.ReadDirectoryDuration
histogram.summary: The duration of ReadDirectory call to SmbProvider in milliseconds. This is recorded after the D-Bus call returns.

histogram.name: NativeSmbFileShare.RemountResult
histogram.summary: The result of the Remount operation during startup. This is recorded after the D-Bus call to Remount returns.

histogram.name: Navigation.BackForward.CacheFlags
histogram.summary: The cache flags set on back-forward navigations.

histogram.name: Navigation.BackForward.IsSameProcess
histogram.summary: Whether the back-forward navigation lead to a change of process or not.

histogram.name: Navigation.BackForward.ReadyToCommitUntilCommit
histogram.summary: The time needed to commit a back forward-navigation once it is ready to commit. This is the time between ReadyToCommit and DidFinishNavigation (for a navigation that commits).

histogram.name: Navigation.BackForward.TimeToReadyToCommit
histogram.summary: The time delta between the start of a back-forward navigation and the time it was ready to commit.

histogram.name: Navigation.BackForward.WasCached
histogram.summary: Whether the back-forward navigation was served from cache.

histogram.name: Navigation.ClearSiteData.Duration
histogram.summary: Recorded when a navigation is deferred while clearing site data. Indicates how much time the clearing took.

histogram.name: Navigation.ClearSiteData.Parameters
histogram.summary: The parameters of the Clear-Site-Data header. Recorded when the header is successfully parsed.

histogram.name: Navigation.DeferredDocumentLoading.StatesV1
histogram.summary: Why and if cross-origin documents would be loaded in a world where we defer loading until they are visible.

histogram.name: Navigation.DeferredDocumentLoading.StatesV2
histogram.summary: Why and if cross-origin documents would be loaded if we were to defer loading as long as possible.

histogram.name: Navigation.DeferredDocumentLoading.StatesV3
histogram.summary: Why and if cross-origin documents would be loaded if we were to defer loading as long as possible. Difference from V2: frames positioned both above and to the left of the page have their own bucket and are no longer counted in the "above" bucket.

histogram.name: Navigation.DeferredDocumentLoading.StatesV4
histogram.summary: Why and if cross-origin documents would be loaded if we were to defer loading as long as possible. Changes from V3: replace detailed reasons with summaries for four strategies. E.g. any document that would load under a strategy of loading when a frame is two screens away is logged to the WouldLoad2Screens AND WouldLoad3Screens bucket. We only record documents below the current viewport, not to the right of it.

histogram.name: Navigation.EngagementTime.HTTP
histogram.summary: The amount of time that an HTTP page was in the foreground. Recorded on every page close/transition.

histogram.name: Navigation.EngagementTime.HTTPS
histogram.summary: The amount of time that an HTTPS page was in the foreground. Recorded on every page close/transition.

histogram.name: Navigation.EngagementTime.Ratio
histogram.summary: The percentage of time that HTTPS pages were in the foreground, as compared to total foreground time. Recorded whenever user metrics are uploaded.

histogram.name: Navigation.FrameHasEmbeddedCredentials
histogram.summary: Whether the navigation was to a URL that had embedded credentials.

histogram.name: Navigation.Intercept.Ignored
histogram.summary: Records whether the InterceptNavigationThrottle ignored the navigation. This is recorded at the end of every navigation the throttle observes.

histogram.name: Navigation.Intercept.WillStart
histogram.summary:
The microseconds it takes for the InterceptNavigationThrottle to determine if the navigation should be ignored, at WillStartRequest time.
Warning: This metric may include reports from clients with low-resolution clocks (i.e. on Windows, ref. |TimeTicks::IsHighResolution()|). Such reports will cause this metric to have an abnormal distribution. When considering revising this histogram, see UMA_HISTOGRAM_CUSTOM_MICROSECONDS_TIMES for the solution.

histogram.name: Navigation.IOSWKWebViewSlowFastBackForward
histogram.summary: Counts slow/fast back/forward WKWebView navigations on iOS. Fast navigation is a back/forward navigation done with WKBackForwardList.

histogram.name: Navigation.IsMobileOptimized
histogram.summary: Signifies whether a succesfully finished page load for the main frame content width fits within the device width and/or has a fixed page scale.

histogram.name: Navigation.IsSameProcess
histogram.summary: Whether the navigation led to a change of process or not.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameHasEmbeddedCredentials
histogram.summary: Whether the main-frame navigation was to a URL that had embedded credentials.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameScheme
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for each main-frame navigation.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameScheme.DataUrl.MimeType
histogram.summary: The mime type of the data: URL for each main-frame navigation. This only contains mime types that can run scripts.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameSchemeDifferentPage
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for each main-frame navigation that replaces a document object. This is not reported for reference fragment navigations, pushState/replaceState or same page history navigation.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameSchemeDifferentPageOTR
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for each main-frame navigation that replaces a document object while in incognito. This is not reported for reference fragment navigations, pushState/replaceState or same page history navigation.

histogram.name: Navigation.MainFrameSchemeOTR
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for each main-frame navigation while in incognito.

histogram.name: Navigation.OnBeforeUnloadOverheadTime
histogram.summary: Overhead time spent handling the OnBeforeUnload event from the browser standpoint. More precisely, it is the total time between dispatch and acknowledgment of the BeforeUnload event on the browser side, minus the actual time spent executing the BeforeUnload handlers on the renderer side.

histogram.name: Navigation.ReadyToCommitUntilCommit
histogram.summary: The time needed to commit a navigation once it is ready to commit. This is the time between ReadyToCommit and DidFinishNavigation (for a navigation that commits).

histogram.name: Navigation.RedirectChainSize
histogram.summary: Total length of the redirect URL strings in navigation entry. Logged when entry is committed.

histogram.name: Navigation.Reload.ReloadMainResourceToReloadDuration
histogram.summary: Reported when a user triggers reload without any other navigations after the previous reload in the same page, and the previous reload variant was RELOAD_MAIN_RESOURCE. Duration time between two reloads is reported.

histogram.name: Navigation.Reload.ReloadToReloadDuration
histogram.summary: Reported when a user triggers reload without any other navigations after the previous reload in the same page. Duration time between two reloads is reported.

histogram.name: Navigation.Renderer.ReadyToCommitUntilCommit
histogram.summary: The time needed in the renderer process between receiving the message to commit the navigation until the navigation has committed.

histogram.name: Navigation.ResourceHandler.ProceedWithResponseUntilFirstReadCompleted
histogram.summary: The time delta between when the ResourceHandler is allowed to read the response's body and when it has completed its first read.

histogram.name: Navigation.ResourceHandler.ResponseStartedUntilProceedWithResponse
histogram.summary: The time delta between when the ResourceHandler started receiving the response and when it is allowed to read the response's body.

histogram.name: Navigation.Scheduled.MaybeCausedAbort
histogram.summary: window.location and other scheduled navigation changes can cause the current provisional load to be aborted. Many times these are initiated without user gesture. This histogram logs counts of the various aborters.

histogram.name: Navigation.Scheduled.MaybeCausedAbort.Time
histogram.summary: window.location and other scheduled navigation changes can cause the current provisional load to be aborted. Many times these are initiated without user gesture. This histogram logs the time between the aborted navigation start and the scheduled navigation start, if the aborted navigation has a non-zero navigationStart value.

histogram.name: Navigation.SchemePerUniqueOrigin
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for the first main-frame navigation per origin per non-OffTheRecord session.

histogram.name: Navigation.SchemePerUniqueOriginOTR
histogram.summary: The scheme of the URL for the first main-frame navigation per origin per OffTheRecord session.

histogram.name: Navigation.SecureSchemeHasSSLStatus
histogram.summary: True counts the events when a https URL commits with a SSL certificate. False is when the certificate is missing. This should be at 100%, anything less is probably a bug.

histogram.name: Navigation.Start.RendererBrowserDifference.Negative
histogram.obsolete: Data collected and posted on issue 675833.
histogram.summary: The difference between Now() in the renderer and browser_navigation_start for browser-initiated navigations if the difference is negative. This value should ideally only reflect the IPC time between the browser process and renderer process, but in practice could be skewed by inter-process timing errors. If the clocks used for TimeTicks are monotonic across processes, all samples should fall into the Positive bucket.

histogram.name: Navigation.Start.RendererBrowserDifference.Positive
histogram.obsolete: Data collected and posted on issue 675833.
histogram.summary: The difference between Now() in the renderer and browser_navigation_start for browser-initiated navigations if the difference is positive. This value should ideally only reflect the IPC time between the browser process and renderer process, but in practice could be skewed by inter-process timing errors. If the clocks used for TimeTicks are monotonic across processes, all samples should fall into the Positive bucket.

histogram.name: Navigation.StartToCommit
histogram.summary: The time delta between the start of a navigation and the time it is committed.

histogram.name: Navigation.TimeToCommit
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated March 2018 in favor of Navigation.StartToCommit variants.
histogram.summary: Time between the start of a browser-started navigation request in and its commit.

histogram.name: Navigation.TimeToReadyToCommit
histogram.summary: The time delta between the start of a navigation and the time it is ready to commit.

histogram.name: Navigation.TimeToURLJobStart
histogram.summary: Time between the start of a browser-started navigation request and the reception of a corresponding ResourceRequest in the network stack.

histogram.name: Navigation.UI_OnCommitProvisionalLoad.Intent
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2018 in favor of PageLoad metrics.
histogram.summary: Obsolete. Time between receiving an Android Intent and the navigation commit.

histogram.name: Navigation.UI_OnCommitProvisionalLoad.Link
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2018 in favor of PageLoad metrics.
histogram.summary: Obsolete. Time between clicking on a link and the navigation commit.

histogram.name: Navigation.UI_OnLoadComplete.Intent
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2018 in favor of PageLoad metrics.
histogram.summary: Obsolete. Time between receiving an Android intent and the document load complete event for a navigation in the main frame.

histogram.name: Navigation.UI_OnLoadComplete.Link
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2018 in favor of PageLoad metrics.
histogram.summary: Obsolete. Time between clicking on a link and the document load complete event for a navigation in the main frame.

histogram.name: Navigation.URLLoaderNetworkService.OnCompleteCertificateChainsSize
histogram.summary: When the navigation URL loader receives an OnComplete message from the network service that contains certificate chains, this histogram records the size in KB of those pickled certificate chains. This histogram is recorded by the navigation URLLoader for navigations that fetch from network, for every request which contains an SSLInfo in its OnComplete notification.

histogram.name: Navigation.URLLoaderNetworkService.OnCompleteHasSSLInfo
histogram.summary: Whether the network service's OnComplete message to the navigation URL loader contains an SSLInfo, which should only be present for main-frame requests with certificate errors. This histogram is recorded for every request completion by the navigation URL loader that fetches from network.

histogram.name: NavigationSuggestion.Event
histogram.summary: Tracks events when the currently navigated domain name is a lookalike to one of the top 10K domains or a domain that the user interacted with, resulting in a navigation suggestion in the form of "Did you mean to go to ...".

histogram.name: NCN.CellularConnectionSubtype
histogram.summary: The connection subtype of the network the client is connected to, when the client is on a cellular connection. This histogram is logged once per UMA record, if the user is on a cellular connection, at the time the record is finalized.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOn2G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on a 2G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOn3G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on a 3G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOn4G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on a 4G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOnBluetooth
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on a Bluetooth connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOnEthernet
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on an Ethernet connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOnNone
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen while the NetworkChangeNotifier thought there was no network connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOnUnknown
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on an unknown connection type, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FastestRTTOnWifi
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of the fastest round-trip-time seen on a Wifi connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOn2G
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to a 2G connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOn3G
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to a 3G connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOn4G
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to a 4G connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOnBluetooth
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to a Bluetooth connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOnEthernet
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to an Ethernet connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOnNone
histogram.summary:
Time between disconnecting and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOnUnknown
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to an unknown connection type and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.FirstReadOnWifi
histogram.summary:
Time between switching to a Wifi connection and receiving the first network data.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOn2G
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via a 2G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOn3G
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via a 3G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOn4G
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via a 4G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOnBluetooth
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via a Bluetooth connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOnEthernet
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via an Ethernet connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOnNone
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while the NetworkChangeNotifier thought there was no network connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOnUnknown
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via an unknown connection type, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.KBTransferedOnWifi
histogram.summary:
How much data was transfered while connected via a Wifi connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOn2G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on a 2G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOn3G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on a 3G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOn4G
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on a 4G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOnBluetooth
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on a Bluetooth connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOnEthernet
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on an Ethernet connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOnNone
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen while the NetworkChangeNotifier thought there was no network connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOnUnknown
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on an unknown connection type, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.PeakKbpsOnWifi
histogram.summary:
Rough estimate of peak throughput seen on a Wifi connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOn2G
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via a 2G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOn3G
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via a 3G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOn4G
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via a 4G connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOnBluetooth
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via a Bluetooth connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOnEthernet
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via an Ethernet connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOnNone
histogram.summary:
How long was spent disconnected, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOnUnknown
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via an unknown connection type, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.CM.TimeOnWifi
histogram.summary:
How long was spent connected via a Wifi connection, before the NetworkChangeNotifier detected a connectivity change.
This metric is recorded when the NetworkChangeNotifier detects a connectivity change. This will miss data from users whose connection type never changes and will be biased to users whose connection type changes frequently.

histogram.name: NCN.ConnectionTypeChangeToIPAddressChange
histogram.summary: Time from ConnectionTypeChanged message until IPAddressChanged message.

histogram.name: NCN.DNSConfigChange
histogram.summary: Time between DNS configuration change messages.

histogram.name: NCN.GetActiveNetworkInfoResult
histogram.summary: Records the result of querying the network info of the current active network. Useful for investigating how frequently the current network was unblocked, and why it was not unblocked. See http://crbug.com/677365.

histogram.name: NCN.GetConnectionTypeTime
histogram.summary: How long does each call to NetworkChangeNotifier::GetConnectionType() take.

histogram.name: NCN.getNetInfo1stSuccess
histogram.summary: True if the first call to ConnectivityManager.getNetworkInfo(Network) did not throw NullPointerException, false if it did. Useful for investigating and avoiding unexpected exceptions, see http://crbug.com/592131.

histogram.name: NCN.getNetInfo2ndSuccess
histogram.summary: Recorded after the first call to ConnectivityManager.getNetworkInfo(Network) threw a NullPointerException. True if the second call to ConnectivityManager.getNetworkInfo(Network) did not throw NullPointerException, false if it did. Useful for investigating and avoiding unexpected exceptions, see http://crbug.com/592131.

histogram.name: NCN.getWifiInfo1stSuccess
histogram.summary: True if the first call to WifiManager.getConnectionInfo() did not throw NullPointerException, false if it did. Useful for investigating and avoiding unexpected exceptions, see http://crbug.com/592131.

histogram.name: NCN.getWifiInfo2ndSuccess
histogram.summary: Recorded after the first call to WifiManager.getConnectionInfo() threw a NullPointerException. True if the second call to ConnectivityManager.getNetworkInfo(Network) did not throw NullPointerException, false if it did. Useful for investigating and avoiding unexpected exceptions, see http://crbug.com/592131.

histogram.name: NCN.IPAddressChange
histogram.summary: Time between IP address change messages.

histogram.name: NCN.IPAddressChangeToConnectionTypeChange
histogram.summary: Time from IPAddressChanged message until ConnectionTypeChanged message.

histogram.name: NCN.NetworkOfflineChange
histogram.summary: Time between going online until we go offline change messages, using new filtered signal.

histogram.name: NCN.NetworkOnlineChange
histogram.summary: Time between going offline until we go online change messages, using new filtered signal.

histogram.name: NCN.NetworkOperatorMCCMNC
histogram.summary: The MCC (mobile country code) and MNC (mobile network code) of the network operator when a new metrics log is created or when the network connection is changed. A value of zero means a non-mobile network or the operator code is unknown.

histogram.name: NCN.OfflineChange
histogram.summary: Time between going online until we go offline change messages.

histogram.name: NCN.OfflineDataRecv
histogram.summary: Time between when we thought we went offline and when we received some network data (a URLRequest read completed).

histogram.name: NCN.OfflineDataRecvAny5sBeforeOnline
histogram.summary: Count of how many times we received network data (a URLRequest read completed) while offline when some data was received at most five seconds before going online.

histogram.name: NCN.OfflineDataRecvUntilOnline
histogram.summary: Time between when we received the last network data (a URLRequest read completed) while offline and when we thought we went online.

histogram.name: NCN.OfflinePolls
histogram.summary: Count of how many times we polled the online/offline status before detecting an offline to online transition.

histogram.name: NCN.OnlineChange
histogram.summary: Time between going offline until we go online change messages.

histogram.name: NCN.PollingOfflineDataRecv
histogram.summary: Time between when we thought we went offline and when we received some network data (a URLRequest read completed), while polling NetworkChangeNotifier::GetConnectionType() still told us we were offline.

histogram.name: Net.AlternateProtocolBrokenLocation
histogram.summary: Breakdown of the locations when SetBrokenAlternateProtocol is called.

histogram.name: Net.AlternateProtocolUsage
histogram.summary: Breakdown of how requests which could potentially make use of an alternate protocol use or don't use the protocol.

histogram.name: Net.AlternateProtocolUsage.1000Truncated
histogram.summary: Breakdown of how requests which could potentially make use of an alternate protocol use or don't use the protocol. Loaded data for 1000 servers and we have persisted 1000 MRU servers.

histogram.name: Net.AlternateProtocolUsage.200Truncated
histogram.summary: Breakdown of how requests which could potentially make use of an alternate protocol use or don't use the protocol. Loaded data for 200 servers and we have persisted 1000 MRU servers.

histogram.name: Net.AlternateServiceFailed
histogram.summary: Positive net error codes that failed alternative protocol requests end with. Recorded only when an alternative job fails, and the main job succeeds.

histogram.name: Net.AlternativeProxyFailed
histogram.summary:
Positive net error codes that failed alternative proxy requests end with. Recorded when an alternative job fails, whether or not the main job succeeds.
As of M66 this superceded DataReductionProxy.Quic.OnAlternativeProxyBroken.

histogram.name: Net.AlternativeServiceServers.MoreOrEqualCacheEntries
histogram.summary: The difference between the size of alternative service mappings in cache and preferences. This tracks zero or negative values (when the difference between preferences size is less than or equal to memory cache size). Positive values are tracked by Net.AlternativeServiceServers.MorePrefsEntries.

histogram.name: Net.AlternativeServiceServers.MorePrefsEntries
histogram.summary: The difference between the size of alternative service mappings in preferences and cache. This tracks positive values (when the difference between preferences size is greater than memory cache size). Non positive values are tracked by Net.AlternativeServiceServers.MoreOrEqualCacheEntries.

histogram.name: Net.AlternativeServiceTypeForRequest
histogram.summary: Information about the AlternativeService used for each request.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_PendingDataCount
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The count of unacknowledged ResourceMsg_DataReceived messages. This message is sent once per chunk of data read from the network.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_PendingDataCount_WhenFull
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The count of unacknowledged ResourceMsg_DataReceived messages at the point where we pause network loading.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_RedirectHopTime
histogram.summary: The time between the call of AsyncResourceHandler::OnRequestRedirected and the FollowRedirect IPC message from ResourceHost, that is, the length of the redirect browser-renderer-browser hop.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_SharedIOBuffer_Alloc
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The size of a SharedIOBuffer allocation.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_SharedIOBuffer_Used
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of bytes copied into a SharedIOBuffer.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncResourceHandler_SharedIOBuffer_UsedPercentage
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The percentage of a SharedIOBuffer allocation that is actually used.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncRevalidation.ReadError
histogram.summary: Counts of error codes received while reading the body of an async revalidation before getting a response. Only async revalidations that had a read error are counted.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncRevalidation.ResponseError
histogram.summary: Counts of error codes received while performing an async revalidation before getting a response. Only async revalidations that had in a response error are counted.

histogram.name: Net.AsyncRevalidation.Result
histogram.summary: The result of an async revalidation resulting from application of the Cache-Control: stale-while-revalidate directive. All async revalidations are counted.

histogram.name: Net.AuthGenerateToken_basic
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time to generate a Basic HTTP authentication token.

histogram.name: Net.AuthGenerateToken_digest
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time to generate a Digest HTTP authentication token.

histogram.name: Net.AuthGenerateToken_negotiate
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time to generate a Negotiate (or SPNEGO) HTTP authentication token.

histogram.name: Net.AuthGenerateToken_ntlm
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The time to generate an NTLM HTTP authentication token.

histogram.name: Net.AutoReload.CountAtStop
histogram.summary: Number of times auto-reload has been attempted before auto-reload stopped without succeeding, either because the stop button was pressed or because the renderer was destroyed.

histogram.name: Net.AutoReload.CountAtSuccess
histogram.summary: Number of times auto-reload had to attempt to reload a page before succeeding.

histogram.name: Net.AutoReload.ErrorAtFirstSuccess
histogram.summary: Original error code that started an auto-reload which then succeeded on the first attempt.

histogram.name: Net.AutoReload.ErrorAtStop
histogram.summary: Error code, if any, when auto-reload stopped without succeeding, either because the stop button was pressed or because the renderer was destroyed.

histogram.name: Net.AutoReload.ErrorAtSuccess
histogram.summary: Original error code that started an auto-reload which then eventually succeeded.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.ReceivedBytes
histogram.summary: Number of bytes received over this stream.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.SentBytes
histogram.summary: Number of bytes sent over this stream.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.TimeToReadEnd
histogram.summary: How long it takes from starting the request to reading the end of the response.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.TimeToReadStart
histogram.summary: How long it takes from starting the request to reading the start of the response.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.TimeToSendEnd
histogram.summary: How long it takes from starting the request to when the last byte is sent.

histogram.name: Net.BidirectionalStream.TimeToSendStart
histogram.summary: How long it takes from starting the request to when we can start sending data.

histogram.name: Net.CacheState.AllBytes
histogram.summary: Counts of response bytes by cache state.

histogram.name: Net.CacheState.AllRequests
histogram.summary: State of the cache for a request, delta-encoding eligible or otherwise.

histogram.name: Net.CacheState.EncodeableBytes
histogram.summary: Counts of response bytes by cache state for delta-encoding eligible requests.

histogram.name: Net.CacheState.EncodeableRequests
histogram.summary: State of the cache for a delta-encoding eligible request.

histogram.name: Net.CertCommonNameFallback
histogram.summary:
Whether the certificate common name was used for matching the hostname, instead of the subjectAlternativeName.
Measures results for all CAs (internal and publicly-trusted).

histogram.name: Net.CertCommonNameFallbackPrivateCA
histogram.summary:
Whether the certificate common name was used for matching the hostname, instead of the subjectAlternativeName.
Measures results ony for internal (non-publicly-trusted) CAs.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.AndroidAIAFetchError
histogram.summary: The net error code returned after attempting an AIA fetch on Android. Recorded once per intermediate that Chrome attempts to fetch via AIA on Android.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.IgnoreCertificateErrorsSPKIListPresent
histogram.summary: Whether certificate validation was disabled for a set of public keys because the --ignore-certificate-errors-spki-list switch was set on startup.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.IgnoreErrors
histogram.summary: Whether certificate validation was disabled because the --ignore-certificate-errors switch was set on startup.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.SHA1.MainFrame
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2017 as SHA-1 was successfully disabled in 01/2017.
histogram.summary: Whether or not SHA-1 was present in a resource fetched for the main frame, and if so, what its maximum validity period was.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.SHA1.Subresource
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 06/2017 as SHA-1 was successfully disabled in 01/2017.
histogram.summary: Whether or not SHA-1 was present in a subresource fetch, and if so, what its maximum validity period was.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.TLSFeatureExtensionWithPrivateRoot
histogram.summary: This histogram is recorded every time Chrome successfully verifies a certificate that chains to a private root. A value of true indicates that the certificate contains the TLS Feature Extension, and false indicates that it doesn't.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.TLSFeatureExtensionWithPrivateRootHasOCSP
histogram.summary: This histogram is recorded every time Chrome successfully verifies a certificate that chains to a private root and the certificate contains the TLS Feature Extension. A value of true indicates that the connection had an OCSP response stapled, and a value of false indicates that it did not.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.TrustAnchor.Request
histogram.summary: The SHA-256 hash of the subjectPublicKeyInfo of the most-specific trust anchor encountered in a successfully-verified certificate chain, during an HTTP URL request. The associated root certificate can be looked up using https://crt.sh/?spkisha256= .

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.TrustAnchor.Verify
histogram.summary: The SHA-256 hash of the subjectPublicKeyInfo of the most-specific trust anchor encountered in a successfully-verified certificate chain, during verification time. The associated root certificate can be looked up using https://crt.sh/?spkisha256= .

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.TrustAnchor.VerifyOutOfDate
histogram.summary: This histogram is recorded every time Chrome successfully validates a certificate, but cannot determine a public trust anchor from the verified chain. A value of true indicates that the trust anchor list is out of date, as the OS believes a public trust anchor is being used, but the built-in list does not know about this trust anchor, while a value of false indicates that a public trust anchor was not used, thus there is no evidence that the list is out of date. This histogram is temporary until the transition to a unified root store (in source), at which point, the OS store will no longer be consulted for known roots.

histogram.name: Net.Certificate.VerificationSuccessAfterAIAFetchingNeeded
histogram.summary: Whether or not certificate verification was successful after attempting AIA fetching on Android. Recorded once per certificate verification on Android that resulted in an untrusted-root error without AIA fetching.

histogram.name: Net.CertificatePinSuccess
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: A validated certificate chain may be subject to additional "pinning" requirements on a per-domain basis. This records the fraction of successful matches between a certificate chain and a pin list.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.CanInclusionCheckSCT
histogram.summary: Whether an observed Signed Certificate Timestamp (SCT) can be checked for inclusion. An SCT can be checked for inclusion if the client has a valid Signed Tree Head (STH) and the STH currently known to the client was issued 24 hours after the timestamp in the SCT (24 hours being the typical Maximum Merge Delay).

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.ConnectionComplianceStatus.QUIC
histogram.summary: The compliance of each QUIC connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, recorded once on connection setup unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid. Connections can be compliant, or they can be non-compliant for one of several reasons (not enough Signed Certificate Timestamps [SCTs], not diverse enough SCTs, or the build was old so CT compliance wasn't checked).

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.ConnectionComplianceStatus.SSL
histogram.summary: The compliance of each SSL connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, recorded once on connection setup unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid. Connections can be compliant, or they can be non-compliant for one of several reasons (not enough Signed Certificate Timestamps [SCTs], not diverse enough SCTs, or the build was old so CT compliance wasn't checked).

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.ConnectionComplianceStatus2
histogram.summary: The compliance of each connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, recorded once on connection setup unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid. Connections can be compliant, or they can be non-compliant for one of several reasons (not enough Signed Certificate Timestamps [SCTs], not diverse enough SCTs, or the build was old so CT compliance wasn't checked). Not recorded for certificates that chain to locally-installed roots.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.CTRequiredConnectionComplianceStatus
histogram.summary: The compliance of each QUIC connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, for connections for which CT compliance is required for the connection to succeed. (For example, CT compliance is required for certain Certificate Authorities, or a site can opt in to having CT be required.) Recorded once on connection setup for applicable connections unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is otherwise invalid.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.CTRequiredConnectionComplianceStatus.SSL
histogram.summary: The compliance of each SSL connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, for connections for which CT compliance is required for the connection to succeed. (For example, CT compliance is required for certain Certificate Authorities, or a site can opt in to having CT be required.) Recorded once on connection setup for applicable connections unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is otherwise invalid. Not recorded for certificates that chain to locally-installed roots.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.CTRequiredConnectionComplianceStatus2
histogram.summary: The compliance of each connection with the Certificate Transparency policy, for connections for which CT compliance is required for the connection to succeed. (For example, CT compliance is required for certain Certificate Authorities, or a site can opt in to having CT be required.) Recorded once on connection setup for applicable connections unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is otherwise invalid. Not recorded for certificates that chain to locally-installed roots.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.CTRequiredRequestComplianceStatus
histogram.summary: The compliance of each HTTP request with the Certificate Transparency policy, for requests on connections for which CT compliance is required for the connection to succeed. (For example, CT compliance is required for certain Certificate Authorities, or a site can opt in to having CT be required.) Recorded once on request completion for requests on applicable connections, unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is otherwise invalid. Not recorded when the request's certificate chains to a locally-installed root.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryAuditProofError
histogram.summary: Counts of specific error codes returned by LogDnsClient at the end of an attempt to obtain an inclusion proof for a certificate from a Certificate Transparency log.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryAuditProofRcode
histogram.summary: Counts of specific DNS response codes returned by LogDnsClient at the end of an attempt to obtain an inclusion proof for a certificate from a Certificate Transparency log. The response codes (rcodes) and meanings are listed on https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-parameters/dns-parameters.xhtml#dns-parameters-6.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryDuration
histogram.summary: The time taken attempting to obtain an inclusion proof from a Certificate Transparency log over DNS. This includes the time taken to obtain the leaf index first. Emitted at the end of an attempt. Includes attempts that fail.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryDuration.Success
histogram.summary: The time taken to successfully obtain an inclusion proof from a Certificate Transparency log over DNS. This includes the time taken to obtain the leaf index first. Emitted at the end of an attempt.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryLeafIndexError
histogram.summary: Counts of specific error codes returned by LogDnsClient at the end of an attempt to obtain a leaf index for a certificate from a Certificate Transparency log.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryLeafIndexRcode
histogram.summary: Counts of specific DNS response codes returned by LogDnsClient at the end of an attempt to obtain a leaf index for a certificate from a Certificate Transparency log. The response codes (rcodes) and meanings are listed on https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-parameters/dns-parameters.xhtml#dns-parameters-6.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryStatus
histogram.obsolete: Replaced by Net.CertificateTransparency.DnsQueryError, which provides the full range of net::Error codes rather than summarising them into the limited set used by this histogram.
histogram.summary: The status of each attempt to obtain an inclusion proof from a Certificate Transparency log over DNS. This can consist of more than one DNS request. Emitted at the end of an attempt.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.EVCompliance.QUIC
histogram.summary: The state of compliance with Certificate Transparency presence requirements for each EV certificate. Recorded once on QUIC connection setup when the connection uses an EV certificate unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.EVCompliance.SSL
histogram.summary: The state of compliance with Certificate Transparency presence requirements for each EV certificate. Recorded once on SSL connection setup when the connection uses an EV certificate unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.EVCompliance2
histogram.summary: The state of compliance with Certificate Transparency presence requirements for each EV certificate. Recorded once on QUIC connection setup when the connection uses an EV certificate unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that connection or the certificate is invalid. Not recorded for certificates that chain to locally-installed roots.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.InclusionCheckResult
histogram.summary: The result of an inclusion check for a Certificate Transparency log entry (composed of a TLS certificate observed together with Signed Certificate Timestamps). Emitted once per (TLS certificate, Signed Certificate Timestamp) pair observed and checked for inclusion (check results are cached).

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.MainFrameValidSCTCount
histogram.summary: Number of valid Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) present for the main-frame resource. Emitted every time a main-frame resource is fetched.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.PilotSTHAge
histogram.summary: Age of Pilot's Signed Tree Head, as observed by the client, in minutes. Measuring the age of a particular log's Signed Tree Head will allow more informed update frequency of the Component Updater component that provides them. Emitted once for every STH update received by the component updater.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.RequestComplianceStatus
histogram.summary: The compliance of each HTTP request with the Certificate Transparency policy, recorded once on request completion unless CT evaluation has been disabled for that request's connection or the certificate is otherwise invalid. A request's connection can be compliant, or it can be non-compliant for one of several reasons (not enough Signed Certificate Timestamps [SCTs], not diverse enough SCTs, or the build was old so CT compliance wasn't checked). Not recorded when the request's certificate chains to a locally-installed root.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.SCT.SingleVerificationTime
histogram.summary: Time to verify a single SCT (Signed Certificate Timestamps) when setting up a TLS connection. Recorded each time a single SCT is verified. Includes not just the signature verification but also other operations that are involved in verifying an SCT, such as notifying observers and looking up the log that issued the SCT.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.SCT.VerificationTime
histogram.summary: Time to verify the SCTs (Signed Certificate Timestamps) when setting up a TLS connection. Recorded on each connection setup where at least one SCT is verified.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.SCTOrigin
histogram.summary: The origin breakdown of Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs). Emitted once for every SCT when first validated, which means 0 or more times during every SSL connection establishment.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.SCTsPerConnection
histogram.summary: The number of Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) that were available for each SSL connection, including SCTs embedded in the certificate. This metric measures how many SSL connections had SCTs available. Emitted during every SSL connection establishment.

histogram.name: Net.CertificateTransparency.SCTStatus
histogram.summary: Breakdown of Signed Certificate Timestamps (SCTs) validation status. Emitted once for every SCT when first validated, which means 0 or more times during every SSL connection establishment.

histogram.name: Net.CertVerifier_First_Job_Latency
histogram.summary: The actual amount of time spent verifying a certificate using the underlying cryptographic APIs. Because parallel verifications for the same certificate may be coalesced, histograms such as Net.SSLCertVerificationTime may be skewed, due to later verifications taking less overall time. This records the overall time spent verifying the first job to capture initialization costs.

histogram.name: Net.CertVerifier_Job_Latency
histogram.summary: The actual amount of time spent verifying a certificate using the underlying cryptographic APIs. Because parallel verifications for the same certificate may be coalesced, histograms such as Net.SSLCertVerificationTime may be skewed, due to later verifications taking less overall time. This records the overall time spent verifying a single request, regardless of how many parallel requests are being served by the verification.

histogram.name: Net.CertVerifier_TrialComparisonResult
histogram.summary: If the CertDualVerificationTrial is enabled, each certificate verification associated with a (non-incognito) profile which is opted-in to SBER2(Scout) will record the outcome of comparing the primary verifier and secondary verifier results.

histogram.name: Net.CoalescePotential
histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 04/2016 as doesn't have data nor owner.
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The number of times we sent N packets, but could have sent N-1 packets.

histogram.name: Net.ComodoDNSExperimentFailureTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The amount of time taken before we failed to resolve the Comodo test DNS record. This is an experiment, run in conjuction with Comodo, to test the viability of a DNS based certificate revocation mechanism.

histogram.name: Net.ComodoDNSExperimentSuccessTime
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The amount of time taken to successfully resolve the Comodo test DNS record. This is an experiment, run in conjuction with Comodo, to test the viability of a DNS based certificate revocation mechanism.

histogram.name: Net.Compress.NoProxy.BytesAfterCompression
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The uncompressed number of bytes received per request that was compressed. Only includes requests which did not go through an explicit proxy and did not go over SSL.

histogram.name: Net.Compress.NoProxy.BytesBeforeCompression
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The compressed number of bytes received per request that was compressed. Only includes requests which did not go through an explicit proxy and did not go over SSL.

histogram.name: Net.Compress.NoProxy.ShouldHaveBeenCompressed
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The uncompressed number of bytes received per request that was not compressed but appears to have been compressible. Only includes requests which did not go through an explicit proxy and did not go over SSL.

histogram.name: Net.Compress.Proxy.BytesAfterCompression
histogram.owner: Please list the metric's owners. Add more owner tags as needed.
histogram.summary: The uncompressed number of bytes received per request that was compressed. Only includes requests sent through a proxy without SSL.
