suffix.name: NTP.ThirdParty
suffix.label: The NTP served by a third party (e.g. Bing)

suffix.name: BypassedDRP
suffix.label: Bytes of traffic that bypassed the Data Reduction Proxy

suffix.name: Direct
suffix.label: Bytes of traffic that were ineligible for the Data Reduction Proxy

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: Bytes of traffic that don't fit into the other categories of Net.HttpContentLength

suffix.name: ViaDRP
suffix.label: Bytes of traffic that passed through the Data Reduction Proxy

suffix.name: Error
suffix.label: Connection to proxy resulted in an error

suffix.name: DiskCache
suffix.label: DiskCache backend is using disk cache.

suffix.name: MemoryCache
suffix.label: DiskCache backend is using memory cache.

suffix.name: WaitForDataReady
suffix.label: Tracks the last failure reason until WaitForDataReady or its callback is executed. This is recorded when data is ready in WaitForDataReady or when the callback is executed

suffix.name: Failure
suffix.label: Failed to fetch data from background service

suffix.name: IconsColor
suffix.label: Icons using a fallback color (favicon resolution too low).

suffix.name: IconsGray
suffix.label: Icons using a gray color (no favicon available).

suffix.name: IconsReal
suffix.label: Icons using an actual icon published by the site.

suffix.name: Thumbnail
suffix.label: Not an icon but a thumbnail/screenshot of the page.

suffix.name: ThumbnailFailed
suffix.label: Default gray box in place of a thumbnail/screenshot.

suffix.name: client0
suffix.obsolete: Hasn't been used for a while, as of 2016-07.

suffix.name: popular
suffix.label: Deprecated with M-62! Non-personalized, popular suggestions.

suffix.name: popular_fetched
suffix.label: Non-personalized, popular suggestions (fetched from the server).

suffix.name: server0
suffix.obsolete: Hasn't been used for a while, as of 2016-07.

suffix.name: NewTab
suffix.label: NTP loaded on a new tab.

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: Default search provider is not Google.

suffix.name: Active
suffix.label: For a tab active which is shown foreground in a browser window.

suffix.name: Closed
suffix.label: For a tab that is about to be closed.

suffix.name: Detached
suffix.label: For a tab that is being dragged by user to outside of the browser window.

suffix.name: Inactive
suffix.label: For tabs in background and not shown to user.

suffix.name: Fullscreen.Shown
suffix.label: A notification sent by a fullscreen app or webpage that is displayed.

suffix.name: Fullscreen.Suppressed
suffix.label: A notification sent by a fullscreen app or webpage that is not displayed.

suffix.name: Windowed
suffix.label: A notification sent by a non-fullscreen app or webpage.

suffix.name: Negative
suffix.label: Estimate of the metric was lower than observed metric

suffix.name: Positive
suffix.label: Estimate of the metric was higher than observed metric
Recorded approximately 15 seconds after navigation start
Recorded approximately 30 seconds after navigation start
Recorded approximately 60 seconds after navigation start

suffix.name: Broadband
suffix.label: Observed effective connection type was Broadband

suffix.name: Offline
suffix.label: Observed effective connection type was Offline

suffix.name: Slow2G
suffix.label: Observed effective connection type was Slow2G

suffix.name: Unknown
suffix.label: Observed effective connection type was Unknown
Observed metric was between 0 and 20 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 20 and 60 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 60 and 140 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 140 and 300 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 300 and 620 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 620 and 1260 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 1260 and 2540 (inclusive) units
Observed metric was between 2540 and 51000 (inclusive) units

suffix.name: 5100_Infinity
suffix.label: Observed metric was greater than 5100 (inclusive) units

suffix.name: Kbps
suffix.label: Records availability of the downstream throughput estimate.

suffix.name: RTT
suffix.label: Records availability of the HTTP RTT estimate.

suffix.name: TransportRTT
suffix.label: Records availability of the transport RTT estimate.

histogram_suffixes.name: NumLayersBucket
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 2018-07 as the non bucketed metrics are enough for future reference.

histogram_suffixes.name: OffDomainInclusionAbortReason
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 2016-05 as the OffDomainInclusionDetector was removed.

suffix.name: EmptyMainFrameURL
suffix.label: The main frame URL was empty.

suffix.name: HistoryLookupFailed
suffix.label: The lookup to the HistoryService failed.

suffix.name: Incognito
suffix.label: The profile associated with the frame under analysis is an incognito profile.

suffix.name: NoHistoryService
suffix.label: There was no HistoryService associated with the profile of the frame under analysis (this can happen seldomly on startup for early net requests, or on shutdown by the asynchronous nature of the analysis, but shouldn't be common).

suffix.name: NoProfile
suffix.label: The profile associated with the frame under analysis couldn't be resolved (expected to happen at a low frequency by the asynchronous nature of the analysis).

suffix.name: ntp_suggestions
suffix.label: NTP suggestions offlined by the user

suffix.name: Failed
suffix.label: For items that failed being prefetched for any reason.

suffix.name: Successful
suffix.label: For items that were completed sucessfully.

suffix.name: INSTANT_NTP_WITH_FAKEBOX_AS_STARTING_FOCUS
suffix.label: new tab page with fakebox as starting focus

suffix.name: INSTANT_NTP_WITH_OMNIBOX_AS_STARTING_FOCUS
suffix.label: new tab page with omnibox as starting focus

suffix.name: NTP
suffix.label: extension-replaced new tab page OR obsolete new tab page

suffix.name: OBSOLETE_SEARCH_RESULT_PAGE_DOING_SEARCH_TERM_REPLACEMENT
suffix.label: obsolete: search results page with search term replacement

suffix.name: OTHER
suffix.label: other (typically an arbitrary URL, not a search results page, new tab page, etc.)

suffix.name: SEARCH_BUTTON_AS_STARTING_FOCUS
suffix.label: interaction starting with the search button

suffix.name: SEARCH_RESULT_PAGE_NO_SEARCH_TERM_REPLACEMENT
suffix.label: search results page without search term replacement

suffix.name: OutOfRaster
suffix.label: Task was not performed as part of a raster task.

suffix.name: BG
suffix.label: Event occurred at least partially in the background

suffix.name: Background
suffix.label: The page was backgrounded at least once from navigation start to this event.

affected-histogram.name: PageLoad.Clients.ServiceWorker.Timing2.NavigationToFirstContentfulPaint
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated in favor of PaintTiming equivalent.

suffix.name: AfterBuffering
suffix.label: Recorded after buffering of timing updates in the browser process has completed.

suffix.name: AfterPaint
suffix.label: Limited to the duration of time starting after first paint, for page loads that reached first paint.

suffix.name: RedirectToNonAmpPage
suffix.label: Limited to redirects to non-AMP pages.

suffix.name: AtTimingCallbackDispatch
suffix.label: Evaluated at the time timing update calls are dispatched to observers.

suffix.name: Clients.AMP
suffix.label: AMP page load. Same page navigations are not tracked.

suffix.name: Clients.AMP.AmpCache
suffix.label: AMP page load from the AMP cache CDN.

suffix.name: Clients.AMP.GoogleNews
suffix.label: AMP page load in the Google News AMP viewer. Same page navigations are not tracked.

suffix.name: Clients.AMP.GoogleSearch
suffix.label: AMP page load in the Google Search AMP viewer. Same page navigations are not tracked.

suffix.name: Clients.AMPCache
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigations to an AMP cache page. Same page navigations are not tracked.

suffix.name: Clients.AMPCache2
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigations to an AMP cache page. Same page navigations are not tracked.

suffix.name: Clients.CssScanner
suffix.label: Metrics from pages scanned by the preload scanner for @import CSS rules

suffix.name: Clients.DataReductionProxy
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation through the data reduction proxy.

suffix.name: Clients.DataReductionProxy.LoFiOn
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation through the data reduction proxy with session in LoFi enabled or control field trial, and when the connection was slow.

suffix.name: Clients.Previews.LitePages
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation through the data reduction proxy where a lite page response was received.

suffix.name: NonProxied
suffix.label: Resources not loaded through data reduction proxy.

suffix.name: Proxied
suffix.label: Resources loaded through data reduction proxy.

suffix.name: Clients.DocWrite.Block
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that has synchronous, cross-origin document.written scripts that could be blocked if the document.write script blocking feature is enabled.

suffix.name: Clients.FromGoogleSearch
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation from a Google web search

suffix.name: Clients.FromGWS
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation from a Google web search

suffix.name: Clients.FromGWS2
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation from a Google web search

suffix.name: Preconnectable
suffix.label: The predictor database contained origins for preconnecting for a page

suffix.name: Clients.LoFi
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation that displayed a LoFi image.

suffix.name: Clients.MediaPageLoad
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics for page loads that involved playing a media element.

suffix.name: Clients.MultiTabLoading
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics for page loads that started while there are other loading tabs.

suffix.name: Clients.MultiTabLoading.2OrMore
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics for page loads that started while there are 2 or more other loading tabs.

suffix.name: Clients.MultiTabLoading.5OrMore
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics for page loads that started while there are 5 or more other loading tabs.

suffix.name: Clients.NoScriptPreview
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation that tirggered the NoScript Preview intervention.

suffix.name: search
suffix.label: Custom histogram for the Google Search results page.

suffix.name: Clients.Previews.OfflinePages
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation that shows users an offline page preview. Offline page previews are shown when a user's effective connection type is prohibitively slow.

suffix.name: Clients.Protocol.H1
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to main resource over HTTP/1.1

suffix.name: Clients.Protocol.H2
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to main resource over HTTP/2

suffix.name: Clients.Protocol.H11
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to main resource over HTTP/1.1

suffix.name: Clients.Protocol.QUIC
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to main resource over QUIC

histogram_suffixes.name: PageLoadMetricsClientsReload
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated at M53 in favor of LoadType.Reload.

suffix.name: Clients.Reload
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that is reloaded

suffix.name: Clients.ResourceLoadingHintsPreview
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation that used ResourceLoadingHints to show a Preview version of the page.

histogram_suffixes.name: PageLoadMetricsClientsResourcePrefetchPredictor
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated at M66. No longer recorded.

histogram_suffixes.name: PageLoadMetricsClientsResourcePrefetchPredictorPrefetchingType
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated at M66. No longer recorded.

suffix.name: Prefetchable
suffix.label: The predictor database contained subresources for prediction for a page

suffix.name: Clients.Scheme.HTTP
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to a main resource where the committed URL is HTTP.

suffix.name: Clients.Scheme.HTTPS
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation to a main resource where the committed URL is HTTPS.

suffix.name: Clients.NoServiceWorker
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that is not controlled by a Service Worker. This is intended to understand the performance impact of service workers on special apps using Clients.ServiceWorker
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated on June 2018 (M69) in favor of Clients.NoServiceWorker2.

suffix.name: Clients.NoServiceWorker2
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that is either not controlled by a service worker or is controlled by a service worker without a fetch event handler. This should NOT be compared to Clients.ServiceWorker2, see https://goo.gl/EdaGQn.

suffix.name: Clients.ServiceWorker
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that is controlled by a Service Worker.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated on June 2018 (M69) in favor of Clients.ServiceWorker2.

suffix.name: Clients.ServiceWorker2
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics from a page that is controlled by a service worker that has a fetch event handler.

affected-histogram.name: PageLoad.Timing2.NavigationToFirstContentfulPaint
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated in favor of PaintTiming equivalent.

suffix.name: search
suffix.label: Custom histogram for the Google Search results page

suffix.name: Clients.SubresourceFilter
suffix.label: For pages with filtered subresources. Includes dryrun matches.

suffix.name: Clients.TabRestore
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics that are a result of a navigation caused by a tab restore.

suffix.name: LoadType.NewNavigation
suffix.label: Restricted to new navigations (link clicks, URLs typed into the URL box, etc).

suffix.name: MediaPlayed
suffix.label: Limited to pages where media was played.

suffix.name: NoCommit
suffix.label: Limited to page loads that did not commit.

suffix.name: NoEndTime
suffix.label: The page load had no recorded end time, so an end time was synthesized at the time the page end notification was processed.

suffix.name: NoMediaPlayed
suffix.label: Limited to pages where no media was played.

suffix.name: WithoutPaint
suffix.label: The foreground duration for page loads did not reach first paint.

suffix.name: WithPaint
suffix.label: The foreground duration for page loads reached first paint.

suffix.name: Clients.SignedExchange
suffix.label: PageLoadMetrics for page loads for which the document was served through a signed exchange.

suffix.name: UserGesture
suffix.label: Restricted to pages loaded via a user gesture.

suffix.name: UserInitiated
suffix.label: (experimental) Page load metric that is approximately user initiated

suffix.name: BrowserInitiated
suffix.label: (experimental) Page load that was initiated from the browser process

suffix.name: UserGesture
suffix.label: (experimental) Page load that has a user gesture

suffix.name: UserInputEvent
suffix.label: (experimental) Page load that has a user input event

suffix.name: HistoryLoad
suffix.label: but only for user pressing back or forward

suffix.name: LinkLoad
suffix.label: deprecated - see LinkLoadReload, LinkLoadNormal, LinkLoadStaleOk, LinkLoadCacheOnly; content initiated, commonly back to a posted page

suffix.name: LinkLoadCacheOnly
suffix.label: content initiated, commonly back to a posted page, where browser must ONLY use cache

suffix.name: LinkLoadNormal
suffix.label: content initiated, ordinary link traversal or post

suffix.name: LinkLoadStaleOk
suffix.label: content initiated, commonly forward or back where stale cached data is very acceptable

suffix.name: NormalLoad
suffix.label: but only for user entered URL or omnibox search

suffix.name: Reload
suffix.label: but only for user pressed reload

suffix.name: UndefLoad
suffix.label: should never happen... as it is only for an client-code error case which should not exist

suffix.name: HistoryLoad
suffix.label: but only for user pressing back or forward

suffix.name: LinkLoad
suffix.label: deprecated - see LinkLoadReload, LinkLoadNormal, LinkLoadStaleOk, LinkLoadCacheOnly; content initiated, commonly back to a posted page

suffix.name: LinkLoadCacheOnly
suffix.label: content initiated, commonly back to a posted page, where browser must ONLY use cache

suffix.name: LinkLoadNormal
suffix.label: content initiated, ordinary link traversal or post

suffix.name: LinkLoadStaleOk
suffix.label: content initiated, commonly forward or back where stale cached data is very acceptable

suffix.name: NormalLoad
suffix.label: but only for user entered URL or omnibox search

suffix.name: Reload
suffix.label: but only for user pressed reload

suffix.name: UndefLoad
suffix.label: should never happen... as it is only for an client-code error case which should not exist

suffix.name: ParallelizableDownload
suffix.label: Download that supports but doesn't use parallel requests.

suffix.name: WithParallelRequestsMultipleStreams
suffix.label: Bandwidth when multiple streams are active while using parallel requests.

suffix.name: WithParallelRequestsSingleStream
suffix.label: Bandwidth when only a single stream is active while using parallel requests. Other streams are either finished or haven't started.

suffix.name: HTTPSNotHTTP
suffix.label: The credential was suppressed because it was for an HTTPS origin whereas the observed form was for an HTTP origin.

suffix.name: PSLMatching
suffix.label: The credential was suppressed and not auto-filled because it was a PSL-match.

suffix.name: SameOrganizationName
suffix.label: The credential was suppressed because it was for an HTTP/HTTPS origin that was neither an exact nor PSL-match to that of the observed form. Its origin had, however, the same organization-identifying name.

suffix.name: Manual
suffix.label: The password was originally typed in by the user.

suffix.name: AnyPasswordEntry
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by entering a password that matches either/both the sync password or a saved password This is a superset (and should be equal to or larger than) SyncPasswordEntry and ProtectedPasswordEntry

suffix.name: GSuiteSyncPasswordEntry
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by entering the sync password that is associated with a GSuite account. This is a subset of SyncPasswordEntry. Note that GSuite sync password reuse detection is only triggered if configured appropriate enterprise policy.

suffix.name: NonGaiaEnterprisePasswordEntry
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by entering a password that matches a non-Gaia enterprise password. Note that non-Gaia enterprise password reuse detection is only triggered if configured appropriate enterprise policy.

suffix.name: PasswordFieldOnFocus
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by password field on focus event.

suffix.name: ProtectedPasswordEntry
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by entering a saved password that does NOT match the sync password. (TODO(nparker): Rename this to NonSyncPasswordEntry)

suffix.name: SyncPasswordEntry
suffix.label: Password protection triggered by entering the sync password, which may or may not also match a saved password. (This was called SyncProtectedPasswordEntry before M62)

suffix.name: SyncProtectedPasswordEntry
suffix.label: This was renamed by SyncPasswordEntry in M62 (it was misspelled in the code) . Password protection triggered by entering the sync password, which may or may not also match a saved password.

suffix.name: LowReputation
suffix.label: Password protection reponse with low reputation verdict

suffix.name: Phishing
suffix.label: Password protection response with phishing verdict

suffix.name: Safe
suffix.label: Password protection response with safe verdict

suffix.name: FromHttpRealm
suffix.label: The account in question was saved on an HTTP site.

suffix.name: FromHttpsRealm
suffix.label: The account in question was saved on a HTTPS site (including those with certificate issues).

suffix.name: OnAnyRealmWithDifferentHost
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms have different hosts than the account in question, and their scheme is either HTTP or HTTPS.

suffix.name: OnHttpRealmWithDifferentHost
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms have HTTP scheme and different hosts than the account in question.

suffix.name: OnHttpRealmWithSameHost
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms have HTTP scheme and the same host as the account in question.

suffix.name: OnHttpsRealmWithDifferentHost
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms have HTTPS scheme and different hosts than the account in question.

suffix.name: OnHttpsRealmWithSameHost
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms have HTTPS scheme and the same host as the account in question.

suffix.name: OnPSLMatchingRealm
suffix.label: The number of other accounts whose realms are public suffix matches to that of the account in question (the scheme is always the same in these cases).

suffix.name: Android
suffix.label: The password is for an Android app.

suffix.name: Ftp
suffix.label: The scheme of the origin is FTP.

suffix.name: Http
suffix.label: The scheme of the origin is HTTP.

suffix.name: Https
suffix.label: The scheme of the origin is HTTPS.

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: The scheme of the origin is something else.

suffix.name: OtherAborted
suffix.label: The Payment Request was aborted but not but the user

suffix.name: UserAborted
suffix.label: The Payment Request was aborted by the user

suffix.name: ContactInfo
suffix.label: For the contact info section of a Payment Request

suffix.name: CreditCards
suffix.label: For the payment method section of a Payment Request

suffix.name: PaymentMethod
suffix.label: For the payment method section of a Payment Request

suffix.name: ShippingAddress
suffix.label: For the shipping address section of a Payment Request

histogram_suffixes.name: PersistentMemoryAllocs
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 2/2017 for Issue 689315 which indicated they weren't being used.

suffix.name: LaunchFromDiagnostics
suffix.label: when the user launches the ListUrlActivity from the Physical Web diagnostics page

suffix.name: LaunchFromPreferences
suffix.label: when the user launches the ListUrlActivity from the Physical Web preferencs screen

suffix.name: infoCached
suffix.label: size of file-backed memory minus swap and buffer cache.

suffix.name: NoSetting
suffix.label: Engagement when no content setting set.

suffix.name: CPU
suffix.label: Instantaneous power used by the CPU.

suffix.name: GPU0
suffix.label: Instantaneous power used by the first dedicated GPU, if any.

suffix.name: GPU1
suffix.label: Instantaneous power used by the second dedicated GPU, if any.

suffix.name: GPUi
suffix.label: Instantaneous power used by the integrated GPU, if any.

suffix.name: Total
suffix.label: Instantaneous power used by the whole system. May be less useful than other power metrics because it includes peripherals like the display backlight.

suffix.name: DuringStartup
suffix.label: Sampled once per second during the first 30 seconds after launch.

suffix.name: libpepflashplayer.so
suffix.label: Flash player on Linux or Cros

suffix.name: libwidevinecdmadapter.so
suffix.label: Widevine CDM on Linux or Cros

suffix.name: Cellular
suffix.label: covers fetches when connected to cellular networks

suffix.name: ContentPrefetchPrefetchOn
suffix.label: prefetch is enabled but prerender is disabled.

suffix.name: Prerender5minTTL
suffix.label: prerender is enabled, and the TTL is extended to 5 minutes.

suffix.name: PrerenderMatchComplete
suffix.label: prerender is enabled, and match complete replacements are used to gather extended statistics.

suffix.name: PrerenderMulti
suffix.label: prerender is enabled with multiple simultanious prerenders.

suffix.name: PrerenderNoUse
suffix.label: prerender is enabled, but pages are not swapped in.

suffix.name: Cold
suffix.label: Prefetch too old to skip revalidation.

suffix.name: Reference
suffix.label: No prefetch. Warning: do not compare with the load times of prefetched pages (bias).

suffix.name: Visible
suffix.label: Page visible for all of rendering.

suffix.name: none
suffix.label: No origin; in the case of prefetch TTFCP this is when no prefetch was involved.

suffix.name: offline
suffix.label: Prerender triggered for saving a page for offline use.

suffix.name: webcross
suffix.label: Link triggered prerender, rel=prerender, cross domain.

suffix.name: websame
suffix.label: Link triggered prerender, rel=prerender, same domain.

suffix.name: BlinkGC.AllocatedObjects
suffix.label: Only counting objects allocated using Blink GC.

suffix.name: CommandBuffer
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by GL command buffers.

suffix.name: Discardable
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Discardable manager.

suffix.name: Extensions.ValueStore
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Extension value store database.

suffix.name: JavaHeap
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Java heap in Android.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Partition allocator.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc.AllocatedObjects
suffix.label: Only counting objects allocated using Partition allocator.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc.Partitions.ArrayBuffer
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Array buffer partition.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc.Partitions.Buffer
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Buffer partition.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc.Partitions.FastMalloc
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Fast Malloc partition.

suffix.name: PartitionAlloc.Partitions.Layout
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Layout partition.

suffix.name: PrivateMemoryFootprint
suffix.label: Only counting private resident + swapped/compressed memory.

suffix.name: SiteStorage
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Web storage API.

suffix.name: SiteStorage.BlobStorage
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by in-memory blob files.

suffix.name: Skia
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Skia caches.

suffix.name: Skia.SkGlyphCache
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Skia glyph cache.

suffix.name: Skia.SkResourceCache
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Skia bitmap resource cache.

suffix.name: Sync
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Sync storage.

suffix.name: V8
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by V8 javascript engine.

suffix.name: V8.AllocatedObjects
suffix.label: Only counting objects allocated by V8 javascript engine.

suffix.name: DownloadService
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Download service.

suffix.name: FontCaches
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by font caches.

suffix.name: History
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by History service.

suffix.name: LevelDatabase
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Level databases.

suffix.name: Net
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Networking sockets and caches.

suffix.name: Net.UrlRequestContext
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by URL requests and associated http cache.

suffix.name: OmniboxSuggestions
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Omnibox suggestions provider.

suffix.name: SiteStorage.IndexDB
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by IndexedDB API.

suffix.name: SiteStorage.LocalStorage
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Local storage API.

suffix.name: SiteStorage.SessionStorage
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Session storage API.

suffix.name: Sqlite
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Sqlite databases.

suffix.name: TabRestore
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by tab restore page states.

suffix.name: UI
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Android UI bitmaps.

suffix.name: WebCache
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by all resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.CSSStylesheetResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by CSS Stylesheet resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.FontResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Font resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.ImageResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Image resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.OtherResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by other resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.ScriptResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by Script resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: WebCache.XSLStylesheetResources
suffix.label: Only counting memory used by XSL Stylesheet resources in Blink Web Cache.

suffix.name: GAIAAddSession
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Add a Session

suffix.name: GAIADefault
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating the default service type

suffix.name: GAIAIncognito
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Incognito (used for DesktopMenu)

suffix.name: GAIAReAuth
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Reauthenticate this user

suffix.name: GAIASignout
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Signout

suffix.name: GAIASignoutIncognito
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Signout and go Incognito (used for AndroidAccountManagementMenu)

suffix.name: GAIASignup
suffix.label: GAIA-initiated interaction indicating a service type of Add an account

suffix.name: NonGAIA
suffix.label: Interaction was not initiated from GAIA

suffix.name: ToOpenedProfile
suffix.label: The profile being switched to was already loaded and had at least one open browser

suffix.name: ToOpenedProfileWithoutBrowser
suffix.label: The profile being switched to was already opened and had no active browsers

suffix.name: ToUnopenedProfile
suffix.label: The profile being switched to had not yet been loaded this Chrome session

suffix.name: 100Percent_1MinSeen_A
suffix.label: Progressive scan @ all previously seen frequencies (A).

suffix.name: 100Percent_1MinSeen_B
suffix.label: Progressive scan @ all previously seen frequencies (B).

suffix.name: Applied
suffix.label: change has been accepted by user

suffix.name: Discarded
suffix.label: change has been reverted by user

suffix.name: Restored
suffix.label: search provider restored by Protector before showing the bubble

suffix.name: Timeout
suffix.label: change has been ignored by user (timed out)

suffix.name: TotalAllocatedKB
suffix.label: Summed over the PartitionAlloc, malloc, discardable memory, mainThreadIsolate() and BlinkGC allocators

suffix.name: V8MainThreadIsolateKB
suffix.label: Constrained to memory usage by mainThreadIsolate()

suffix.name: 30min
suffix.label: Constrained to each allocator 30min after purging

suffix.name: 60min
suffix.label: Constrained to each allocator 60min after purging

suffix.name: 90min
suffix.label: Constrained to each allocator 90min after purging

suffix.name: ForHTTP
suffix.label: Only insecure HTTP connections are counted.

suffix.name: ForHTTPS
suffix.label: Only secure HTTPS connections are counted.

suffix.name: RandomPort
suffix.label: The operating system randomly selected a source port for the connection.

suffix.name: SelectPort
suffix.label: An effort was mode to (try to) consistently connect using the same source port for the given server IP/port.

suffix.name: CachedServerConfig
suffix.label: Verification time for a server when server config from cache is used.
This metric includes both gpu and software raster.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 02/2018. Using suffix Gpu and Software instead.

suffix.name: Gpu
suffix.label: This metric is for only gpu raster.

suffix.name: Software
suffix.label: This metric is for only software raster.

suffix.name: Gpu
suffix.label: This metric is for only gpu raster.

suffix.name: Oop
suffix.label: This metric is for only oop raster.

suffix.name: CurrentNetwork
suffix.label: This metric is for current network only.

suffix.name: OtherNetworks
suffix.label: This metric is for old networks or networks to be migrated to only.

suffix.name: Fast
suffix.label: Fast start by skipping normal chrome.dll startup.

suffix.name: Duration0To100MilliSec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (0, 0.1] seconds

suffix.name: Duration1To3Sec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (1, 3] seconds

suffix.name: Duration3To5Sec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (3, 5] seconds

suffix.name: Duration5To10Sec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (5, 10] seconds

suffix.name: Duration10To15Sec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (10, 15] seconds

suffix.name: Duration100MilliSecTo1Sec
suffix.label: remoting sessions have duration in (0.1, 1] seconds

suffix.name: Char
suffix.label: The Char event occurs on textual keyboard input.

suffix.name: GestureDoubleTap
suffix.label: A GestureDoubleTap occurs when the user double taps on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureFlingCancel
suffix.label: A GestureFlingCancel is sent to the renderer to cancel any active flings.

suffix.name: GestureFlingStart
suffix.label: A GestureFlingStart is sent when the user quickly flicks on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureLongPress
suffix.label: A GestureLongPress is sent when the user taps down and holds their finger on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureLongTap
suffix.label: A GestureLongTap is sent when the user taps down on a touchscreen, holds their finger for a while, then releases.

suffix.name: GesturePinchBegin
suffix.label: A GesturePinchBegin is sent when a user starts a pinch zoom motion on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GesturePinchEnd
suffix.label: A GesturePinchEnd is sent when the user releases their fingers from the touchscreen after performing a pinch zoom motion.

suffix.name: GesturePinchUpdate
suffix.label: GesturePinchUpdate events are sent while the user is performing a pinch zoom motion on a touch screen. GesturePinchUpdate events are sent as the user changes the distance between their fingers.

suffix.name: GestureScrollBegin
suffix.label: A GestureScrollBegin is sent at the beginning of a gesture scroll on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureScrollEnd
suffix.label: A GestureScrollEnd is sent when the user releases their finger after a gesture scroll on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureScrollUpdate
suffix.label: GestureScrollUpdate events are sent as the user drags their finger along the touchscreen during a gesture scroll.

suffix.name: GestureScrollUpdateWithoutPropagation
suffix.label: GestureScrollUpdateWithoutPropagation events are scroll updates that shouldn't bubble, generated by a gesture fling.

suffix.name: GestureShowPress
suffix.label: A GestureShowPress event is sent when the user presses down on the touchscreen but before a GestureTapDown.

suffix.name: GestureTap
suffix.label: A GestureTap is sent when the user presses down and releases on a touchscreen.

suffix.name: GestureTapCancel
suffix.label: A GestureTapCancel is sent to cancel a pending GestureTap event. For example, if the user taps down but drags their finger instead of releasing it.

suffix.name: GestureTapDown
suffix.label: A GestureTapDown is sent when the user presses on the touchscreen in what could potentially be a full GestureTap event.

suffix.name: GestureTapUnconfirmed
suffix.label: A GestureTapUnconfirmed is sent when the user taps the touchscreen but, due to a delay, the GestureTap isn't sent yet.

suffix.name: GestureTwoFingerTap
suffix.label: A GestureTwoFingerTap is sent when the user presses down a releases on a touchscreen with two fingers.

suffix.name: KeyDown
suffix.label: A KeyDown event is sent when a keyboard key is pressed down.

suffix.name: KeyUp
suffix.label: A KeyUp event is sent when a depressed keyboard key is released.

suffix.name: MouseDown
suffix.label: A MouseDown event is sent when the user click down a mouse button.

suffix.name: MouseEnter
suffix.label: A MouseEnter event is sent when the mouse cursor enters the renderer area.

suffix.name: MouseLeave
suffix.label: A MouseLeave event is sent when the mouse cursor leaves the renderer area.

suffix.name: MouseMove
suffix.label: A MouseMove event is sent when the mouse cursor moves within the renderer area.

suffix.name: MouseUp
suffix.label: A MouseUp event is sent when a depressed mouse button is released.

suffix.name: MouseWheel
suffix.label: A MouseWheel event is sent when the user scrolls using the mouse wheel within the renderer area.

suffix.name: RawKeyDown
suffix.label: A RawKeyDown event is a wrapper around a native key event.

suffix.name: TouchCancel
suffix.label: A TouchCancel is used to cancel an existing touch point. For example, if the user drags a finger outside the bounds of the renderer.

suffix.name: TouchEnd
suffix.label: A TouchEnd is send when the user lifts a finger from the touchscreen.

suffix.name: TouchMove
suffix.label: A TouchMove is sent when the user moves a finger along the touchscreen.

suffix.name: TouchStart
suffix.label: A TouchStart is sent when the user first touches a finger to the touchscreen.

suffix.name: NonDiscardableTotalAllocated
suffix.label: Summed over the PartitionAlloc, malloc, mainThreadIsolate() and BlinkGC allocators

suffix.name: TotalAllocated
suffix.label: Summed over the PartitionAlloc, malloc, discardable memory, mainThreadIsolate() and BlinkGC allocators

suffix.name: TotalAllocatedPerRenderView
suffix.label: TotalAllocated divided by the number of RenderViews

suffix.name: V8MainThreadIsolate
suffix.label: Constrained to memory usage by mainThreadIsolate()

suffix.name: DidFinishLoad
suffix.label: Recorded each time DidFinishLoad is called for *any* frame within the page.

suffix.name: MainFrame.PeakDuringLoad
suffix.label: In the main frame, polled each time CreateURLLoader is called, and the maximum value is recorded when DidFinishLoad is called.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 04/2018. No longer recorded.

suffix.name: MainFrameDidFinishLoad
suffix.label: Recorded when DidFinishLoad is called for the main frame.

suffix.name: PeakDuringLoad
suffix.label: Polled each time CreateURLLoader is called, and the maximum value is recorded when DidFinishLoad is called.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 04/2018. No longer recorded.

suffix.name: ServiceWorkerControlledMainFrame.PeakDuringLoad
suffix.label: In the main frame which is controlled by a service worker, polled each time CreateURLLoader is called, and the maximum value is recorded when DidFinishLoad is called.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 04/2018. No longer recorded.

suffix.name: ServiceWorkerControlledMainFrameDidFinishLoad
suffix.label: Recorded when DidFinishLoad is called for the main frame which is controlled by a service worker.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of June 2018. No longer recorded. This was also being recorded when the page had a controller with no fetch event, which usually means the service worker was not running.

suffix.name: Background.AfterFifthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular task type starting from the sixth minute after backgrounding the renderer. The renderer is expected to be mostly idle during this period.

suffix.name: Background.AfterTenthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular task type starting from the eleventh minute after backgrounding the renderer. The renderer is expected to be mostly idle during this period.

suffix.name: CrossOriginBackground
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from cross-origin backgrounded frames.

suffix.name: CrossOriginHidden
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from cross-origin offscreen frames.

suffix.name: CrossOriginVisible
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from cross-origin onscreen frames.

suffix.name: MainFrameBackground
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from backgrounded main frames.

suffix.name: MainFrameHidden
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from offscreen main frames.

suffix.name: MainFrameVisible
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from onscreen main frames.

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from events with detached or nonexistent frames.

suffix.name: SameOriginBackground
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from same-origin backgrounded frames.

suffix.name: SameOriginHidden
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from same-origin offscreen frames.

suffix.name: SameOriginVisible
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from same-origin onscreen frames.

suffix.name: Compositor
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the compositor task queue.

suffix.name: Default
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the default task queue.

suffix.name: DefaultLoading
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the default loading task queue.

suffix.name: FrameLoading
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the frame loading task queue.

suffix.name: FramePausable
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the frame pausable task queue.

suffix.name: FrameThrottleable
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the frame throttleable task queue.

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from events in any other task queue.

suffix.name: Unthrottled
suffix.label: Expected Queueing Time from the unthrottled task queue.

suffix.name: Background
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is backgrounded. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Background.AfterFifthMinute
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is backgrounded for longer than five minutes. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Background.AfterFirstMinute
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is backgrounded for longer than one minute. Most of loading tasks are expected to complete by then. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Background.AfterTenthMinute
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is backgrounded for longer than ten minutes. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Extension.Background
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is backgrounded. This only includes extension renderers.

suffix.name: Extension.Foreground
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is foregrounded. This only includes extension renderers.

suffix.name: Foreground
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is foregrounded. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Foreground.AfterFirstMinute
suffix.label: Main thread load when the renderer is foregrounded for longer than one minute. Most of loading tasks are expected to complete by then. This does not include extension renderers.

suffix.name: Background
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type when the renderer is in the background.

suffix.name: Background.AfterFifthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type starting from the sixth minute after backgrounding the renderer. The renderer is expected to be mostly idle during this period.

suffix.name: Background.AfterTenthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular type starting from the eleventh minute after backgrounding the renderer. The renderer is expected to be mostly idle during this period.

suffix.name: Background.FifthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the fifth minute after backgrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Background.FirstMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the first minute after backgrounding the renderer. A large amount of loading tasks are expected during this period.

suffix.name: Background.FourthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the fourth minute after backgrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Background.KeepAlive.AfterFifthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type starting from the sixth minute after backgrounding the renderer when keep-alive signal is present.

suffix.name: Background.KeepAlive.AfterTenthMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type starting from the eleventh minute after backgrounding the renderer when keep-alive signal is present.

suffix.name: Background.SecondMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the second minute after backgrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Background.ThirdMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the third minute after backgrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Foreground
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type when the renderer is in the foreground. Please note that individual tabs in this renderer can be backgrounded.

suffix.name: Foreground.AfterThirdMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type starting from the fourth minute after foregrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Foreground.FirstMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the first minute after foregrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Foreground.SecondMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the second minute after foregrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Foreground.ThirdMinute
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type during the third minute after foregrounding the renderer.

suffix.name: Hidden
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type when the renderer is hidden.

suffix.name: HiddenMusic
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type when the renderer is hidden and is playing audible sound.

suffix.name: Visible
suffix.label: Time spent in tasks of a particular queue type when the renderer is visible.

suffix.name: Compositor
suffix.label: Measurement taken on the compositor thread.

suffix.name: Main
suffix.label: Measurement taken on the main/render thread.

suffix.name: ClearKey
suffix.label: Requests for the Clear Key key system.

suffix.name: Unknown
suffix.label: Requests for an unknown or unsupported key system.

suffix.name: Widevine
suffix.label: Requests for the Widevine key system.

suffix.name: SuggestionFetcher
suffix.label: Fetcher for content suggestions on mobile NTP

suffix.name: SuggestionFetcherActiveNTPUser
suffix.label: Fetcher for content suggestions on mobile NTP - active NTP users

suffix.name: SuggestionFetcherActiveSuggestionsConsumer
suffix.label: Fetcher for content suggestions on mobile NTP - active suggestions consumers

suffix.name: SuggestionFetcherRareNTPUser
suffix.label: Fetcher for content suggestions on mobile NTP - rare NTP users

suffix.name: SuggestionThumbnailFetcher
suffix.label: Fetcher for article thumbnails on mobile NTP

suffix.name: InliningApplicable
suffix.label: Resources that the chunk inlining is applicable.
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/703188.

suffix.name: LT_32kB
suffix.label: Sliced for resources smaller than 32kB and larger than 2kB.

suffix.name: LT_512kB
suffix.label: Sliced for resources smaller than 512kB and larger than 32kB.

suffix.name: MainframePartiallyThrottled
suffix.label: Main frame, partially throttled
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/768325.

suffix.name: SubframePartiallyThrottled
suffix.label: Sub frame, partially throttled
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/768325.

suffix.name: NotPrefetched
suffix.label: Number of non-prefetched pages on each type of network.

suffix.name: Prefetched
suffix.label: Number of prefetched pages on each type of network.

suffix.name: Bluetooth
suffix.label: Page load time in bluetooth network.

suffix.name: Cellular
suffix.label: Page load time in cellular network.

suffix.name: None
suffix.label: Page load time without network connection.

suffix.name: Unknown
suffix.label: Page load time in unknown type of network.

suffix.name: WiFi
suffix.label: Page load time in WiFi network.

suffix.name: NotPrefetched
suffix.label: Page load time for non-prefetched pages.

suffix.name: Prefetched
suffix.label: Page load time for prefetched pages.

suffix.name: Host
suffix.label: Page load time for prefetched pages based on main frame host.

suffix.name: Url
suffix.label: Page load time for prefetched pages based on main frame URL.
Covers statistics when the maximum subresources that can be prefetched is set to 25.
Covers statistics when the maximum subresources that can be prefetched is set to 50.

suffix.name: Count
suffix.label: Predicted accuracy stats as the raw numbers.

suffix.name: PercentOfTotalPrefetched
suffix.label: Predicted accuracy stats as percent of total resources prefetched.

suffix.name: Max5Clients
suffix.label: Two to five Clients in the ResourceScheduler.

suffix.name: Max15Clients
suffix.label: Six to fifteen Clients in the ResourceScheduler.

suffix.name: Max30Clients
suffix.label: Sixteen to thirty Clients in the ResourceScheduler.

suffix.name: Over30Clients
suffix.label: Over thirty Clients in the ResourceScheduler.

suffix.name: LayoutBlocking
suffix.label: Records the highest number of delayable requests that were in-flight at the same time when a layout blocking request was in-flight. Recorded every time a layout blocking request finishes.

suffix.name: NonDelayable
suffix.label: Records the highest number of delayable requests that were in-flight at the same time when a non-delayable request was in-flight. Recorded every time a non-delayable request finishes.

suffix.name: TotalLayoutBlocking
suffix.label: Layout blocking requests in-flight were counted.

suffix.name: EAP
suffix.label: Records roams in a network using 802.1X authentication without Fast Transition

suffix.name: FTEAP
suffix.label: Records roams in a network using 802.1X authentication with Fast Transition

suffix.name: FTPSK
suffix.label: Records roams in a network using PSK authentication with Fast Transition

suffix.name: PSK
suffix.label: Records roams in a network using PSK authentication without Fast Transition

suffix.name: NoScoutGroup
suffix.label: User sees the legacy Extended Reporting opt-in

suffix.name: ScoutGroup
suffix.label: User sees the new Extended Reporting opt-in

suffix.name: First_Disabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in for first time and disabled it

suffix.name: First_Enabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in for first time and enabled it

suffix.name: First_LeftUnchecked
suffix.label: User saw opt-in for first time and left it unchecked

suffix.name: Repeat_Disabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in again and changed it to disabled

suffix.name: Repeat_Enabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in again and changed it to enabled

suffix.name: Repeat_LeftDisabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in again and left it disabled

suffix.name: Repeat_LeftEnabled
suffix.label: User saw opt-in again and left it enabled

suffix.name: SecurityInterstitial
suffix.label: One of the Security Interstitials (malware, SSL, etc)

suffix.name: SBER1Pref
suffix.label: Value of the legacy Extended Reporting pref

suffix.name: SBER2Pref
suffix.label: Value of the new Extended Reporting pref

suffix.name: Abandoned
suffix.label: Connection abandoned, or interstitial displayed and user did not proceed to site

suffix.name: Safe
suffix.label: Passed SafeBrowsing check, or blocked and interstitial clicked through

suffix.name: Checked
suffix.label: Resources that were checked. Logged before the resource starts loading and again for each redirect.

suffix.name: Safe
suffix.label: Resources that were checked and deemed safe. Logged when the URL check is completed.

suffix.name: Skipped
suffix.label: Resources that were not checked because they are not active-ish content types. Only used on mobile. Logged before the resource request starts.

suffix.name: Unsafe
suffix.label: Resources that were checked and classified as unsafe. Logged when the URL check is completed.

suffix.name: UnsafePrefetchCanceled
suffix.label: Pre-fetched resources that were checked and classified as unsafe. Logged as the request is canceled.

suffix.name: Tracked
suffix.label: Total duration of all tasks managed by the scheduler. This histogram is similar to the plain .CPUTimePerThread, but it ensures that the number of samples matches the .Untracked version of the same histogram.

suffix.name: Untracked
suffix.label: Total execution time unaccounted for by the scheduler. Calculated as the difference between total thread time and the sum of all tasks managed by the scheduler.

suffix.name: FrameRate
suffix.label: Frames per second sent, in fps. The value is reported when a stream is removed and is calculated as the total number of frames in this layer, divided by the duration of the call.

suffix.name: Qp
suffix.label: Average quantizer (qp) of frames sent. The value is reported when a stream is removed and is calculated, for this layer, as the sum of all qp values divided the number of frames.

suffix.name: TargetBitrate
suffix.label: Average target bitrate in kbps. The value is reported when a stream is removed and is calculated as the sum of all target bitrates for this layer (sampled after frame has been encoded) divided by the total number of frames for this layer.

suffix.name: from_client_side_detection
suffix.label: Interstitial for a resource classified as unsafe by the client side detection.

suffix.name: from_data_saver
suffix.label: Interstitial for a resource classified as unsafe by the Data Saver service.

suffix.name: from_device
suffix.label: Interstitial for a resource classified as unsafe by the Safe Browsing database via either {Local,Remote}SafeBrowsingDatabaseManager.

suffix.name: from_device_v4
suffix.label: Interstitial for a resource classified as unsafe by the Safe Browsing database version 4 via either {Local,Remote}SafeBrowsingDatabaseManager.

suffix.name: InstalledWorker.ImportedScript
suffix.label: Imported script for an installed worker

suffix.name: InstalledWorker.MainScript
suffix.label: Main script for an installed worker

suffix.name: NewWorker.ImportedScript
suffix.label: Imported script for new (not installed) worker

suffix.name: NewWorker.MainScript
suffix.label: Main script for a new (not installed) worker

suffix.name: GEOFENCING
suffix.label: GEOFENCING
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 5/2016 because geofencing got removed.

suffix.name: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_MOUSE_DOWN
suffix.label: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_MOUSE_DOWN
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/616502.

suffix.name: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_TAP_DOWN
suffix.label: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_TAP_DOWN
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/616502.

suffix.name: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_TAP_UNCONFIRMED
suffix.label: NAVIGATION_HINT_LINK_TAP_UNCONFIRMED
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/616502.

histogram_suffixes.name: ServiceWorker.NavigationHint
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/616502.

suffix.name: IsRunningNavigationHintTask
suffix.label: Starting a service worker for a navigation hint.
suffix.obsolete: This experiment was turned down, see https://crbug.com/616502.

suffix.name: DuringStartup
suffix.label: The worker started up during browser startup.

suffix.name: ExistingReadyProcess
suffix.label: An existing ready process was used for the worker.

suffix.name: ExistingUnreadyProcess
suffix.label: An existing unready process was used for the worker.

suffix.name: NewProcess
suffix.label: A new process was created for the worker.

suffix.name: DuringStartup
suffix.label: The worker started up during browser startup.

suffix.name: ExistingProcess
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 07/2017. Replaced by ExistingUnreadyProcess and ExistingReadyProcess.

suffix.name: ExistingReadyProcess
suffix.label: An existing ready process was used for the worker.

suffix.name: ExistingUnreadyProcess
suffix.label: An existing unready process was used for the worker.

suffix.name: NewProcess
suffix.label: A new process was created for the worker.

suffix.name: RunningWorker
suffix.label: The activated worker was already running.

suffix.name: StartingWorker
suffix.label: The activated worker was already starting up.

suffix.name: StartWorkerDuringStartup
suffix.label: Started a worker during browser startup.

suffix.name: StartWorkerExistingProcess
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 07/2017. Replaced by StartWorkerExistingUnreadyProcess and StartWorkerExistingReadyProcess.

suffix.name: StartWorkerExistingReadyProcess
suffix.label: Started a worker in an existing ready process.

suffix.name: StartWorkerExistingUnreadyProcess
suffix.label: Started a worker in an existing unready process.

suffix.name: StartWorkerNewProcess
suffix.label: Started a worker in a new process.

suffix.name: Batch
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. Replaced by ServiceWorkerCache.Cache.Put and ServiceWorkerCache.Cache.Delete.

suffix.name: Delete
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'delete' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which deletes matching entries in the cache.

suffix.name: Keys
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. Replaced by ServiceWorkerCache.Cache.Keys2 in order to use a larger maximum value.

suffix.name: Keys2
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'keys' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which returns all of the keys in the cache.

suffix.name: Match
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. Replaced by ServiceWorkerCache.Cache.Match2 in order to use a larger maximum value.

suffix.name: Match2
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a lookup.

suffix.name: MatchAll
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. Replaced by ServiceWorkerCache.Cache.MatchAll2 in order to use a larger maximum value.

suffix.name: MatchAll2
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'matchAll' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a mass cache lookup.

suffix.name: Put
suffix.label: The time to perform 'put' operations on a ServiceWorker Cache, which writes new entries into the cache. This includes both put() method calls and the storage write operation performed by add()/addAll() method calls.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchDisabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'delete' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which deletes matching entries in the cache, when the ignoreSearch option is set to false.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchEnabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'delete' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which deletes matching entries in the cache, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchDisabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'keys' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which returns all matching keys in the cache, when the ignoreSearch option is set to false.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchEnabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'keys' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which returns all matching keys in the cache, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchDisabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to false.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchEnabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchDisabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'matchAll' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a mass cache lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchEnabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'matchAll' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a mass cache lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: Delete
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'delete' operation on a ServiceWorker CacheStorage, which deletes a cache.

suffix.name: Has
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'has' operation on a ServiceWorker CacheStorage, which returns if the cache exists.

suffix.name: Keys
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'keys' operation on a ServiceWorker CacheStorage, which returns all of the cache names.

suffix.name: Match
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. Replaced by ServiceWorkerCache.CacheStorage.Match2 in order to use a larger maximum value.

suffix.name: Match2
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker CacheStorage, which does a shortcut cache lookup.

suffix.name: Open
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'open' operation on a ServiceWorker CacheStorage, which gets or creates a cache.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchDisabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a shortcut cache lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to false.

suffix.name: IgnoreSearchEnabled
suffix.label: The time to perform the 'match' operation on a ServiceWorker Cache, which does a shortcut cache lookup, when the ignoreSearch option is set to true.

suffix.name: docs
suffix.label: Custom histogram for Google Docs and Drive

suffix.name: ntp
suffix.label: Custom histogram for New Tab Page

suffix.name: WorkerStartOccurred
suffix.label: The worker was not already running. Worker startup occurred.

suffix.name: MemoryPressure
suffix.label: Total tabs involved in session restore that encountered memory pressure.

suffix.name: MemoryPressure_Loaded
suffix.label: Tabs fully loaded before memory pressure.

suffix.name: MemoryPressure_LoadStarted
suffix.label: Tabs started to load before memory pressure.

suffix.name: NoMemoryPressure
suffix.label: Total tabs involved in a session restore that did not encounter memory pressure.

suffix.name: NoMemoryPressure_Loaded
suffix.label: Tabs fully loaded in a session restore that did not encounter memory pressure.

suffix.name: NoMemoryPressure_LoadStarted
suffix.label: Tabs started to load in a session restore that did not encounter memory pressure.

suffix.name: InvalidVersion
suffix.label: After an invalid version was read.

suffix.name: ReadNextMapIdError
suffix.label: After reading the map id failed.

suffix.name: ReadVersionError
suffix.label: After reading the schema version failed.

suffix.name: DefaultSearch
suffix.label: Reset state for default search engine.

suffix.name: psk
suffix.label: Network is security with WPA or WPA-2 (aka RSN)

suffix.name: Fast
suffix.label: Fast start by skipping normal chrome.dll startup.

suffix.name: AndroidAccountConsistencyFirstRunActions
suffix.label: Signin Flow shown on android after Account Consistency flag was enabled.

suffix.name: Failure
suffix.label: The authenticaion token can not be verified due to persisten error

suffix.name: FirstRun
suffix.label: First execution of the reconciler after the profile was loaded or the new_profile_management flag was toggled.

suffix.name: SubsequentRun
suffix.label: Execution of the reconciler triggered by some other change of state.

suffix.name: NewAccount
suffix.label: Using a new account, in the sign-in promo.

suffix.name: NewAccountExistingAccount
suffix.label: Using a new account, in the sign-in promo, while Chrome knows about other accounts.

suffix.name: NewAccountNoExistingAccount
suffix.label: Using a new account, in the sign-in promo, while Chrome does not know about other accounts.

suffix.name: NewAccountPreDice
suffix.label: Using a new account on Desktop, pre-Dice.

suffix.name: NotDefault
suffix.label: Using not the default account, in the sign-in promo.

suffix.name: WithDefault
suffix.label: Using the default account, in the sign-in promo.

suffix.name: WithIndex
suffix.label: The Simple Cache index was loaded.

suffix.name: WithoutIndex
suffix.label: The Simple Cache index was not yet loaded.

suffix.name: Plain
suffix.label: Classified as plain text MIME type.

suffix.name: SSLforHTTPSProxy
suffix.label: SSLClientSocket wrapping the TCPClient socket eventually used for connection to an HTTPS proxy

suffix.name: SSLForProxies
suffix.label: SSLClientSocket wrapping the TCPClient socket eventually used for connection to a proxy

suffix.name: TCP
suffix.label: plain, no proxy, no SSL socket

suffix.name: TCPforHTTPProxy
suffix.label: TCPClientSocket eventually used for connection to an HTTP proxy

suffix.name: TCPforHTTPSProxy
suffix.label: TCPClientSocket eventually used for connection to an HTTPS proxy

suffix.name: TCPforSOCKS
suffix.label: TCPClientSocket eventually used for connection to a SOCKS proxy

suffix.name: cwndMin10
suffix.label: using dynamic cwnd policy no lower than 10

suffix.name: cwndMin16
suffix.label: using dynamic cwnd policy no lower than 16

suffix.name: npn_with_http
suffix.label: with NPN negotiated but using HTTP instead of SPDY

suffix.name: npn_with_spdy
suffix.label: with NPN negotiated and using SPDY

suffix.name: NoLoad
suffix.label: Abandoned before first main frame load.

suffix.name: LukewarmStartup
suffix.label: Startup was neither warm nor cold.

suffix.name: WarmStartup
suffix.label: Startup was warm (almost no hard faults).

suffix.name: ThreadNowDuration
suffix.label: Duration is in thread CPU time.

suffix.name: StartWorkerExistingProcess
suffix.label: The worker started up in an existing process

suffix.name: StartWorkerExistingProcess
suffix.label: The worker started up in an existing process

suffix.name: File
suffix.label: Appending a file with a known size.

suffix.name: FileSystem
suffix.label: Appending a filesystem object with known size.

suffix.name: OnMemoryPressure
suffix.label: Eviction was triggered because of memory pressure signal.

suffix.name: SizeExceededInMemoryLimit
suffix.label: Eviction was triggered because the total size exceeded maximum in memory size allwed

suffix.name: SizeExceededMaxDiskSpace
suffix.label: Eviction was triggered because the total size exceeded maximum available disk space

suffix.name: ConnectionOpened
suffix.label: Scanning is interrupted by an new connection to the database.

suffix.name: MaxIterations
suffix.label: Scanning is stopped because the maximum record iteration count was hit.

suffix.name: SweepError
suffix.label: Scanning is stopped because a leveldb error was encountered during sweeping.

suffix.name: TimeoutReached
suffix.label: Scanning is stopped by the timeout.

suffix.name: LocalGoogle
suffix.label: Local New Tab page for Google.

suffix.name: LocalOther
suffix.label: Local New Tab page for a non-Google provider.

suffix.name: Other
suffix.label: New Tab page for a non-Google provider.

suffix.name: Actual
suffix.label: The time it takes to show a real live frame from the renderer on the screen after the user selects a tab. This doesn not include fake snapshots or other tricks, but the actual time to get real interactable content displayed.

suffix.name: Perceived
suffix.label: The time it takes to show something on the screen after the user selects a tab. This might be a fake snapshot or it might just be the time it takes to show the real content if no snapshot was available.

histogram_suffixes.name: TaskSchedulerMayBlock
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 1/2018. Merged with TaskSchedulerTaskPriority into TaskSchedulerTaskType to reduce suffixing.

suffix.name: MayBlock
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with MayBlock() or WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.BackgroundTaskPriority
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 4/2017. Units changed from milliseconds to microseconds.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.UserBlockingTaskPriority
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 4/2017. Units changed from milliseconds to microseconds.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.UserVisibleTaskPriority
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 4/2017. Units changed from milliseconds to microseconds.

suffix.name: ContentChild
suffix.label: TaskSchedulers for various instantiations of content::ChildProcess.

histogram_suffixes.name: TaskSchedulerTaskPriority
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 1/2018. Merged with TaskSchedulerMayBlock into TaskSchedulerTaskType to reduce suffixing.

suffix.name: BackgroundTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a BACKGROUND priority.

suffix.name: UserBlockingTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_BLOCKING priority.

suffix.name: UserVisibleTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_VISIBLE priority.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 4/2017. Units changed from milliseconds to microseconds.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.BackgroundFileIOPool
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2016. Pool name removed from task latency histogram name.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.BackgroundPool
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2016. Pool name removed from task latency histogram name.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.ForegroundFileIOPool
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2016. Pool name removed from task latency histogram name.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency.ForegroundPool
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2016. Pool name removed from task latency histogram name.

suffix.name: BackgroundTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a BACKGROUND priority and neither of MayBlock() nor WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: BackgroundTaskPriority_MayBlock
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a BACKGROUND priority and MayBlock() or WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: UserBlockingTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_BLOCKING priority and neither of MayBlock() nor WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: UserBlockingTaskPriority_MayBlock
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_BLOCKING priority and MayBlock() or WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: UserVisibleTaskPriority
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_VISIBLE priority and neither of MayBlock() nor WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: UserVisibleTaskPriority_MayBlock
suffix.label: Applies to tasks posted with a USER_VISIBLE priority and MayBlock() or WithBaseSyncPrimitives().

suffix.name: BackgroundBlockingPool
suffix.label: Applies to the BackgroundBlocking worker pool.

suffix.name: BackgroundFileIOPool
suffix.label: Applies to the BackgroundFileIO worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 02/2017. Pool was renamed to BackgroundBlocking.

suffix.name: BackgroundPool
suffix.label: Applies to the Background worker pool.

suffix.name: ForegroundBlockingPool
suffix.label: Applies to the ForegroundBlocking worker pool.

suffix.name: ForegroundFileIOPool
suffix.label: Applies to the ForegroundFileIO worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 02/2017. Pool was renamed to ForegroundBlocking.

suffix.name: ForegroundPool
suffix.label: Applies to the Foreground worker pool.

suffix.name: RendererBackgroundBlockingPool
suffix.label: Applies to the RendererBackgroundBlocking worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of TaskSchedulerName suffix.

suffix.name: RendererBackgroundPool
suffix.label: Applies to the RendererBackground worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of TaskSchedulerName suffix.

suffix.name: RendererForegroundBlockingPool
suffix.label: Applies to the RendererForegroundBlocking worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of TaskSchedulerName suffix.

suffix.name: RendererForegroundPool
suffix.label: Applies to the RendererForeground worker pool.
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of TaskSchedulerName suffix.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.DetachDuration
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of explicit .Browser suffix.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.NumTasksBeforeDetach
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of explicit .Browser suffix.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.NumTasksBetweenWaits
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 01/2018. In favor of explicit .Browser suffix.

affected-histogram.name: TaskScheduler.TaskLatency
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated 12/2016. Pool name removed from task latency histogram name.

suffix.name: CACHE
suffix.label: where watched thread is CACHE BrowserThread.

suffix.name: DB
suffix.label: where watched thread is DB BrowserThread.

suffix.name: FILE
suffix.label: where watched thread is FILE BrowserThread.

suffix.name: IO
suffix.label: where watched thread is IO BrowserThread.

suffix.name: UI
suffix.label: where watched thread is UI BrowserThread.

suffix.name: TabHidden
suffix.label: Triggered by the tab being hidden.

histogram_suffixes.name: TimestampTimebaseProcess
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated as of 11/2017 in Issue 650338. Using a DCHECK instead.

suffix.name: NotQuic
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2015. Use Net.HttpJob.*Secure.NotQuic instead.

suffix.name: Quic
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2015. Use Net.HttpJob.*Secure.Quic instead.

suffix.name: Secure.NotQuic
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 08/2018. No longer used.

suffix.name: Secure.Quic
suffix.label: Recorded for Google servers (https) only when QUIC is used.

suffix.name: FromRegistry
suffix.label: Validation using MACs in the Windows Registry.

suffix.name: App
suffix.label: Restricted to app source id types.

suffix.name: Navigation
suffix.label: Restricted to navigation source id types.

suffix.name: Ukm
suffix.label: Restricted to UKM source id types.

suffix.name: NoUnackedPackets
suffix.label: The session had no outstanding unacked packets.

suffix.name: UnackedPackets
suffix.label: The session had outstanding unacked packets.

suffix.name: UncompressedChromeArchive
suffix.label: uncompressed archive: chrome.7z holding install dir (big).

affected-histogram.name: NewTabPage.ContentSuggestions.TimeUntilFirstSoftTrigger
affected-histogram.obsolete: Deprecated as of July 2017, in favor of NewTabPage.ContentSuggestions.TimeUntilFirstShownTrigger and NewTabPage.ContentSuggestions.TimeUntilFirstStartupTrigger.

suffix.name: docs
suffix.label: Custom histogram for Google Docs and Drive

suffix.name: top10
suffix.label: Custom histogram for Alexa's Top10 non-Google sites

suffix.name: asm
suffix.label: This histogram contains results for asm.js

suffix.name: wasm
suffix.label: This histogram contains results for WASM modules

suffix.name: Clear
suffix.label: Success status for clearing the DB

suffix.name: Destroy
suffix.label: Success status for destroying the DB - DEPRECATED Sept 2018

suffix.name: Initialize
suffix.label: Success status for initializing the DB.

suffix.name: LoadKeys
suffix.label: Success status for loading all DB keys

suffix.name: Read
suffix.label: Success status for reading from the DB

suffix.name: Write
suffix.label: Success status for writing to the DB

suffix.name: H264
suffix.label: Video codec: H264. QP range: 0-51. No spatial layers.

suffix.name: Vp8
suffix.label: Video codec: VP8. QP range: 0-127. Single stream sent.

suffix.name: Vp8.S0
suffix.label: Video codec: VP8. QP range: 0-127. Spatial index 0.

suffix.name: Vp8.S1
suffix.label: Video codec: VP8. QP range: 0-127. Spatial index 1.

suffix.name: Vp8.S2
suffix.label: Video codec: VP8. QP range: 0-127. Spatial index 2.

suffix.name: Vp9
suffix.label: Video codec: VP9. QP range: 0-255. No spatial layers.

suffix.name: Vp9.S0
suffix.label: Video codec: VP9. QP range: 0-255. Spatial layer 0.

suffix.name: Vp9.S1
suffix.label: Video codec: VP9. QP range: 0-255. Spatial layer 1.

suffix.name: Vp9.S2
suffix.label: Video codec: VP9. QP range: 0-255. Spatial layer 2.

suffix.name: Hidden
suffix.label: The tab is not visible because it is in a minimized window (desktop) or background app (mobile), or because it isn't active in its tab strip.

suffix.name: Occluded
suffix.label: The tab is fully covered by other windows. ChromeOS and Mac OS X only.

suffix.name: Visible
suffix.label: The tab is visible. Except on ChromeOS and Mac OS X, a tab fully covered by other windows is considered visible.

suffix.name: AllVR
suffix.label: Entered either VR Browsing or WebVR mode.

suffix.name: WebVRPresentation
suffix.label: Entered WebVR presentation mode (also includes splash screen).

suffix.name: VrBrowser
suffix.label: FRE not complete when starting Chrome

suffix.name: WebVRAutopresent
suffix.label: FRE not complete when starting WebVR auto-presentation

suffix.name: Unknown
suffix.label: GVR version used with an unknown headset.

suffix.name: GVR
suffix.label: The GVR version being used for VR. Special values: (-4) Could not encode GVR version; (-3) Device does not support VR; (-2) GVR is not installed; (-1) GVR is installed but version is too old to be logged.

suffix.name: Browser
suffix.label: The session is restricted to the period that the browser is displaying a regular page.

suffix.name: Fullscreen
suffix.label: The session is restricted to the period that the browser is displaying fullscreen content.

suffix.name: WebVR
suffix.label: The session is restricted to the period that browser is displaying WebVR contents.

suffix.name: others
suffix.label: Fonts other than Roboto and Open Sans

histogram_suffixes.name: WebFontMissedCacheAndInterventionTriggeredOrNot
histogram_suffixes.obsolete: Deprecated 10/2017. Related field trial has finished rolling out.

suffix.name: MissedCacheAndInterventionNotTriggered
suffix.label: On missed cache and intervention not triggered

suffix.name: MissedCacheAndInterventionTriggered
suffix.label: On missed cache and intervention triggered

suffix.name: EME
suffix.label: For Encrypted Media Extensions (EME) based playbacks.

suffix.name: MSE
suffix.label: For Media Source Extensions (MSE) based playbacks.

suffix.name: Max
suffix.label: The maximum over the time interval

suffix.name: Min
suffix.label: The minimum over the time interval

suffix.name: Value
suffix.label: The last estimated value of the time interval

suffix.name: Average
suffix.label: The average over the time interval

suffix.name: Max
suffix.label: The maximum over the time interval

suffix.name: Min
suffix.label: The minimum over the time interval

suffix.name: Disabled
suffix.label: Neither extra webstore link is visible

suffix.name: FooterLink
suffix.label: Link in bottom right of footer

suffix.name: InlineDefault
suffix.label: Inline layout style, default browser promo only

suffix.name: SectionedDefault
suffix.label: Sectioned layout style, default browser promo only

suffix.name: BookmarkOpen
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 02/2015. Use WrenchMenu.TimeToAction.OpenBookmark instead.

suffix.name: CreateShortcuts
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 04/2017. Replaced by Bookmark Apps (CreateHostedApp).

suffix.name: RecentTab
suffix.obsolete: Deprecated as of 02/2015. Use WrenchMenu.TimeToAction.OpenRecentTab instead.
